constraints: 1. Include at least 3 different types of automated actions (e.g., email response, task creation, data logging). 2. The workflow must integrate with at least one database or CRM system. 3. Prepare a flowchart or diagram to illustrate the workflow structure. 4. Document the rationale for choosing the specific automation tools and methods used.
example_prompt: Design an automated workflow for processing customer inquiries that incorporates email notifications, task assignments to support staff, and updates to a customer relationship management (CRM) system. Ensure the workflow responds to inquiries during non-business hours and includes escalation procedures for urgent requests.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive automation workflow diagram along with documentation that describes the chosen tools, the automation processes involved, and the rationale behind the design decisions made.

title: Automating Sales Data Analysis
description: In this challenge, you will design an automated workflow to analyze monthly sales data from an e-commerce platform. Use a combination of data extraction techniques, data cleaning, and analysis tools to generate insights on sales trends and performance metrics, then visualize the results through a dashboard.
constraints: 1. Utilize at least one automation tool (e.g., Power BI, Google Data Studio) to create a dashboard. 2. Include data cleaning steps in your process. 3. Present at least three key insights from your analysis.
example_prompt: You have access to a CSV file containing sales data for the last six months. Automate the extraction and analysis of this data to create a report that highlights month-over-month sales growth and identifies top-selling products.
expected_outcome: A well-structured automated workflow that extracts, cleans, and analyzes the sales data, along with a dashboard displaying the key insights and visualizations such as graphs or charts representing sales trends and product performance.

title: Automate Inventory Management System with Real-Time Reporting
description: Design a fully automated inventory management system that integrates with existing sales data to ensure real-time stock availability. Your system should optimize stock levels, automate reordering processes, and generate comprehensive reports that highlight trends and forecast future inventory needs.
constraints: The solution must utilize at least two automation tools (e.g., Zapier and Google Sheets) and include a flowchart mapping out the process. You must also provide a detailed explanation of how this system minimizes errors and increases efficiency. The presentation should not exceed 10 slides.
example_prompt: Create a workflow that connects your sales platform to your inventory management system using automation tools, detailing each step and automation tool used.
expected_outcome: A scalable inventory management proposal that includes a step-by-step automation guide, a flowchart, and a set of performance metrics to evaluate the success of the system. Additional annotations should explain how the proposed system can improve productivity and reduce human error.

title: Automate Sales Order Processing System
description: Design a comprehensive automation system for processing sales orders that includes data entry from multiple sources, validation checks, and notifications. The system should automate tracking of order status and integrate with inventory management tools to ensure accurate stock levels, and provide real-time reporting on order fulfillment metrics.
constraints: Must utilize at least two different automation tools (e.g., Zapier, Integromat, or custom scripts). The workflow must include error handling and a user notification system. Document all steps and chosen tools clearly.
example_prompt: Create an automated workflow that triggers from a new order submission in a Google Form, validates the entered data against an inventory sheet, sends a confirmation email to the customer, and updates the order status in a project management tool like Trello or Asana.
expected_outcome: A well-defined automation workflow process that automates the entire sales order processing chain, documented with tool selection reasoning, step-by-step execution guidelines, and screenshots or examples of the implementation.

title: Automating the Customer Feedback Loop
description: Design a fully automated workflow for collecting, analyzing, and responding to customer feedback using automation tools. Your task is to integrate a survey tool with your CRM and set up triggers that categorize and escalate feedback based on sentiment analysis, ultimately creating an actionable report for stakeholders every week.
constraints: 1. Use at least two different automation tools in your solution (e.g., Zapier, Integromat). 2. Incorporate a method for sentiment analysis to categorize feedback. 3. Ensure the output report is automatically generated and sent to specified stakeholders.
example_prompt: Create a workflow that connects Google Forms for customer survey responses to Salesforce for CRM integration, triggers a sentiment analysis using an API, and generates a weekly report email to the management team.
expected_outcome: A detailed workflow diagram or document outlining the steps taken, the tools integrated, and a sample report format showcasing how customer feedback is summarized and categorized for stakeholder review.

title: Automating Sales Data Analysis for Business Insights
description: In this challenge, students will create an automated system that analyzes sales data from a CSV file to generate key performance indicators (KPIs) such as total sales, average sale value, and sales trends over time. Participants are required to use Python with libraries such as pandas and matplotlib to process data and visualize results in an automated report format.
constraints: Students must use Python, must include at least three KPIs, and the report must be generated in HTML format. Data manipulation and visualization must be handled using specified libraries (pandas and matplotlib).
example_prompt: Given a CSV file named 'sales_data.csv' containing columns: 'Date', 'Sales_Amount', and 'Customer_ID', write a Python script that produces an HTML report with total sales, average sale value, and a trend line of sales over the past month.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python script that processes the sales data, calculates the necessary KPIs, and generates a well-structured HTML report displaying the results and relevant visualizations.

title: Automate Inventory Management System
description: Design a fully functional inventory management system that automates stock tracking and reorder processes using a workflow automation tool. The system should integrate with at least two external applications (like a sales platform and a supply chain management tool) to fetch and update data in real-time, minimizing manual input and errors in inventory levels.
constraints: 1. Use a chosen workflow automation tool (e.g., Zapier, Microsoft Power Automate) to implement the automation. 2. The solution must handle at least three different inventory scenarios (overstock, low stock, and new stock entry). 3. Provide documentation that outlines the workflow, integration points, and a flow diagram of the automated process.
example_prompt: Create an inventory management workflow that notifies the procurement team when stock levels fall below a certain threshold, automatically updates the sales portal with available stock, and generates an order to suppliers for restocking.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive automated inventory management workflow that accurately tracks and updates stock levels, integrates with external applications, and provides clear documentation including a flow diagram and step-by-step instructions.

title: Workflow Automation for Client Onboarding
description: Design an automated workflow system for the client onboarding process of a hypothetical consulting firm. The system should integrate multiple tools (like a CRM, email service, and document management system) to streamline the steps from initial contact to full onboarding, minimizing manual intervention and errors.
constraints: 1. Integrate at least three different software tools. 2. Include automated email notifications at each stage. 3. Document the workflow with a flowchart and a summary of the tools used.
example_prompt: Create a detailed workflow automation for onboarding clients, specifying the tools used (e.g., HubSpot, Mailchimp, Google Drive) and how they interact at each stage of the process.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive workflow automation plan including a flowchart representation, a summary of tools and their interconnections, and a proposed timeline for each onboarding phase.

title: Crafting Effective Marketing Prompts for Customer Engagement
description: In this challenge, students will create prompts designed to engage customers effectively in a marketing campaign. Focus on refining the language, tone, and specificity of your prompts to encourage authentic interactions from customers. Utilize techniques discussed in class to craft prompts that can be used in social media posts, email marketing, or product descriptions.
constraints: Prompts must be specific to a product or service of your choice, no more than 50 words, and should aim to evoke a clear action from the customer (e.g., click, comment, share). Students should provide context on the product/service and the intended audience.
example_prompt: "Tell us about your experience using our new eco-friendly detergent! How has it made a difference for you? Share your story and inspire others to try out our product!"
expected_outcome: The AI should generate engaging responses from potential customers, showcasing their experiences and encouraging further interaction that can amplify the marketing message.

title: Maximizing Customer Retention through Personalized Prompts
description: In this challenge, students will design a series of personalized prompts aimed at improving customer retention for a fictional subscription-based service. They must consider customer data segments such as behavior, preferences, and purchase history to create tailored prompts that engage customers and encourage loyalty.
constraints: Students must create at least three distinct prompts for different customer segments, ensuring each prompt is designed to address specific customer needs and motivations. The prompts should be concise and impactful, and each must include an actionable call to engagement or feedback.
example_prompt: "Based on your recent interests, we think you'll love these new features! Click here to explore and provide feedback on how we can tailor them for you!"
expected_outcome: The AI should generate specific, actionable prompts tailored to different customer segments that clearly demonstrate understanding of customer data and engagement strategies, ultimately aiming for customer retention.

title: Automated Customer Feedback Loop
description: Create a series of 5 automated prompts that encourage customers to provide feedback on their recent purchase experience. These prompts should be designed to collect actionable insights that can be utilized to enhance product offerings and improve customer satisfaction. Focus on clarity, engagement, and ensuring responses can be quantitatively analyzed for future marketing strategies and product development.
constraints: 1. Each prompt must be unique and tailored to specific stages of the customer journey. 2. Prompts should aim for open-ended as well as close-ended responses for comprehensive feedback. 3. Incorporate at least one prompt that encourages suggestions for future improvements.
example_prompt: 1. How would you rate your purchase experience from 1 to 5? 2. What product features did you find most valuable? 3. Can you describe a difficulty you encountered during your experience? 4. What new products or features would you like to see in the future? 5. Any additional comments to help us improve?
expected_outcome: A structured list of prompts ready for automation that can elicit informative, actionable feedback, driving growth and refinement of the product and service offerings.

title: Design a Product Feedback Prompt for Revenue Optimization
description: In this challenge, you will create a prompt that gathers qualitative feedback from users on a product feature. Your goal is to ensure the prompt elicits detailed insights that the team can use to refine the feature, with a focus on how it impacts user willingness to pay. This exercise will enhance your skills in crafting prompts that drive actionable business insights.
constraints: The prompt must be concise (no more than 50 words) and should ask at least two specific questions about the product feature's value and usability. Ensure it encourages detailed responses that can inform design decisions.
example_prompt: "What are your thoughts on our new subscription feature? How does it affect your likelihood to subscribe? Please describe any improvements that could enhance your experience."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-structured feedback prompt that captures user insights on product value and usability, helping the team identify areas for improvement to increase revenue.

title: Developing a High-Impact Marketing Campaign Prompt
description: Craft a series of prompts designed to generate creative marketing strategies for a fictional tech startup aiming to increase subscription revenue. Your prompts should cover different aspects of marketing such as audience targeting, messaging, channel selection, and retention strategies. Ensure that your prompts encourage innovative ideas while remaining aligned with measurable business outcomes.
constraints: Each prompt must focus on a specific marketing element (e.g., brand messaging, digital advertising, customer retention) and require an outcome that can be quantified (e.g., expected increase in CTR, growth in subscriber base).
example_prompt: 'Generate three unique value propositions for a SaaS product aimed at small businesses in the healthcare sector, emphasizing cost-saving and efficiency.'
expected_outcome: A set of detailed marketing strategies that includes specific metrics for expected outcomes, demonstrating how the strategies will drive growth and optimize revenue in measurable ways, such as estimated conversion rates or customer acquisition costs.

title: Design a Data-Driven Marketing Campaign Prompt
description: Create a prompt that leverages customer data analytics to design a targeted marketing campaign for a fictional product. The prompt should instruct the AI to use demographic and psychographic data to tailor the campaign, including recommended channels, messaging, and key performance indicators (KPIs) for measuring success.
constraints: Include at least three different data points (e.g., age, interests, purchase history) that the AI must consider. The prompt must limit the campaign to a specific budget and include two potential channels for outreach.
example_prompt: Using the given customer data (age: 25-35, interests: fitness and healthy living, purchase history: organic products), create a marketing campaign for a new line of organic protein bars with a budget of $10,000. Focus on social media and email marketing as your channels, and suggest two specific KPIs to measure success.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed proposal for the marketing campaign, specifying the messaging, the selected channels, a breakdown of the budget, and how the suggested KPIs will help evaluate the campaign's effectiveness.

title: Crafting Effective Marketing Prompts
description: For this challenge, students will create a series of prompts designed to generate marketing copy for a new product launch. The prompts should guide an AI to produce engaging and persuasive text that highlights the product's unique benefits and encourages potential customers to take action. Students should focus on clarity, specificity, and incorporating a tone aligned with the brand's voice.
constraints: Create at least three distinct prompts targeting different aspects of marketing: product features, customer testimonials, and promotional offers. Ensure that each prompt is no longer than 50 words.
example_prompt: Generate a catchy product description for a new eco-friendly water bottle that emphasizes its sustainability and health benefits. Use a friendly and engaging tone that appeals to environmentally-conscious consumers.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce concise marketing copy that effectively showcases the water bottle's features, resonates with the target audience, and includes a clear call to action.

title: Optimizing a Product Launch with Strategic Prompts
description: In this challenge, you will create a series of prompts designed to guide an AI in generating a comprehensive product launch plan for a new tech gadget. Your prompts should encourage the AI to analyze the target market, suggest effective marketing strategies, and propose revenue optimization techniques that align with principles learned in the course.
constraints: Include at least three prompts focusing on different aspects: market analysis, marketing strategies, and revenue optimization. The prompts must be clear, specific, and actionable to yield useful outputs.
example_prompt: "Analyze the target demographic for a new smart home device and outline the key features that would appeal to them. Include potential marketing channels and pricing strategies based on competitor analysis."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed and structured product launch plan that includes market insights, suggested marketing tactics, and revenue strategies tailored to the product type and target audience.

title: Optimizing Marketing Copy Through Prompt Engineering
description: In this challenge, you will create a series of targeted prompts designed to generate marketing copy for a fictional product aimed at a specific audience segment. Your goal is to leverage prompt engineering techniques to produce effective, persuasive messages that align with the principles of growth and revenue optimization. Analyze the output for effectiveness and propose refinements to your prompts based on the results.
constraints: 1. Create at least three distinct prompts targeting different stages of the customer journey (awareness, consideration, and decision). 2. Ensure each prompt is tailored to a specific audience demographic. 3. Limit each generated response to 150 words to encourage concise messaging.
example_prompt: Generate a marketing email copy that targets young professionals interested in a new productivity app, focused on how the app helps save time and boost efficiency during work hours.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce tailored marketing copy that effectively addresses the needs and pain points of the target audience, encouraging engagement and driving conversions.

title: Crafting Effective Marketing Prompts for Customer Engagement
description: For this challenge, students will create a series of marketing prompts aimed at increasing customer engagement for a fictional product. Students will consider various aspects of audience targeting and persuasive language as they design their prompts to motivate action and enhance customer interaction.
constraints: Students must create at least three unique prompts, each tailored to a different segment of the target audience. Each prompt should be under 50 words and include a clear call to action.
example_prompt: "Unlock 20% off your next purchase of [Product Name]! Share your feedback in a quick survey and claim your discount!"
expected_outcome: The AI should generate responsive and engaging marketing prompts that resonate with the specified audience segments and include effective calls to action.

title: Prompt Optimization for Revenue Forecasting
description: In this challenge, students will create a series of optimized prompts to forecast revenue for a hypothetical SaaS company based on varying market conditions. Students must experiment with different phrasing, context, and question formatting to derive accurate predictions and actionable insights for a 12-month revenue plan.
constraints: Students must create at least five different prompts, each incorporating varying degrees of specificity and contextual data about the market, customer segments, and potential economic factors. Each prompt must generate a distinct response and be capable of producing actionable insights.
example_prompt: "Given the current trends in subscription-based services and a 20% increase in marketing budget, predict the monthly revenue for the next 12 months and highlight the key factors influencing this growth."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a revenue forecast with monthly projections, including the rationale behind the predictions and the key factors affecting growth. It should also provide strategies that the company could implement based on the forecasted trends.

title: Designing a Revenue-Optimized Product Feature
description: Students are tasked with creating a product feature that enhances customer engagement and drives revenue. They must employ prompt engineering techniques to draft effective prompts that guide users through the new feature, ensuring clarity and maximizing conversion rates. Students should reflect on user feedback and iterate their prompts for optimal effectiveness.
constraints: Prompts must be designed for at least three different user personas, and each prompt should include a call-to-action that encourages user engagement. The final submission must also include a brief rationale for the choices made and expected outcomes from the prompts.
example_prompt: Create an engaging prompt for a new subscription service that highlights its benefits for a busy professional looking to save time.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate tailored prompts for each user persona that effectively communicate the value of the new feature and include actionable steps for users, along with an explanation of how these prompts could potentially increase conversion rates.

title: Crafting Engaging Marketing Prompts for Customer Personas
description: In this challenge, students will create a set of prompts designed to engage specific customer personas for a fictional product. The goal is to develop engaging marketing messages that resonate with the target audience based on their demographics, interests, and pain points. Students will then test these prompts to see how well they capture the persona's attention and promote engagement.
constraints: Create 3 different marketing prompts for 3 distinct customer personas; each prompt must include a clear call to action and be no longer than 2 sentences.
example_prompt: "Write a compelling social media ad for a fitness app targeting young professionals who struggle to find time for workouts. Include a motivating scenario and a call to action to try the app for free this week!"
expected_outcome: The AI should produce engaging marketing messages tailored to each persona, demonstrating an understanding of their motivations and encouraging action towards using the product.

title: Automate Order Processing for E-Commerce
description: Design an automated workflow for an e-commerce business that streamlines the order processing from receipt to shipment. This challenge involves integrating an online store platform with inventory management and shipment tracking systems, ensuring a seamless transition of data while minimizing manual intervention.
constraints: Use at least two different automation tools or APIs, such as Zapier, Integromat, or custom scripts. Ensure that the system captures relevant order details, updates inventory levels, and sends confirmation emails to both customers and warehouse staff.
example_prompt: Create a flow using Zapier to automate the order processing from Shopify, including updates to Google Sheets for inventory tracking and sending emails via Gmail for confirmation.
expected_outcome: A documented workflow that outlines each step of the order processing automation, with specific tool integrations and a brief explanation of how each component works together to reduce manual workload.

title: Design a Comprehensive Business Automation Workflow
description: Create a detailed automation workflow for a fictional e-commerce business that includes inventory management, order processing, and customer communication. The workflow should leverage at least three different automation tools or techniques, explaining how each integrates into the overall system to enhance efficiency and reduce manual tasks.
constraints: The solution must include a visual representation of the workflow, identify bottlenecks in the existing process, and suggest specific tools for automation. Include a rationale for each tool's selection and its expected impact on productivity.
example_prompt: Outline an automation strategy using tools such as Zapier, Integromat, and a CRM system to streamline the order fulfillment process of an online store.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive workflow diagram with annotations for each step, an analysis of potential bottlenecks, selected automation tools with justification, and a projected outcome regarding efficiency gains and error reduction.

title: Automated Sales Reporting System Design
description: Create a comprehensive outline for an automated sales reporting system that integrates with existing CRM tools and utilizes data visualization techniques. Your design should detail the data sources, automation tools to be used (such as Zapier or Microsoft Power Automate), and the process for generating real-time insights for decision-making.
constraints: Design must include integration strategy for at least two different CRM platforms and leverage at least one data visualization tool. Outlines should be clear and easily implementable with available resources.
example_prompt: Outline a full automation strategy for generating weekly sales reports from Salesforce and HubSpot using Zapier and Tableau, emphasizing efficiency and minimal manual input.
expected_outcome: A clear, detailed outline of an automated sales reporting process, including integration points, tools used, and potential challenges with their solutions, suitable for immediate implementation.

title: Design an Automated Invoice Processing System
description: In this challenge, you will design an automated system to process incoming invoices for a small business. The system should extract relevant data such as invoice number, date, vendor name, and total amount, and categorize invoices based on predefined criteria. You will also need to consider how to handle exceptions and ensure data accuracy.
constraints: The system must utilize at least one automation tool (e.g., Zapier, Integromat), include error handling mechanisms, and outline data storage solutions.
example_prompt: Design an automated workflow that processes invoices received via email, extracts key data, and stores it in a cloud-based spreadsheet.
expected_outcome: A detailed workflow plan that includes steps for data extraction, categorization, error handling, and storage, along with tools and technologies to be used.

title: AI-Driven Workflow Optimization
description: Design a comprehensive automation solution for a fictional e-commerce business that processes hundreds of orders daily. Your system should integrate multiple tools like Zapier for workflow automation, Google Sheets for data management, and email software for customer communications, ensuring minimal manual intervention and maximum efficiency in order processing.
constraints: The solution must incorporate at least three different automation tools, define their interactions clearly, and outline the intended workflow. Include considerations for error handling and scalability.
example_prompt: Draft a detailed workflow using Zapier, Google Sheets, and Mailchimp to automate the order confirmation process in an e-commerce scenario, including error management strategies.
expected_outcome: A step-by-step automation blueprint that showcases the interaction of the selected tools, along with a description of error handlers and how the system can be scaled for more transactions in the future.

title: Automate Business Workflow Analysis
description: In this challenge, you will analyze a current business workflow, identify bottlenecks, and propose an automation solution using one or more tools studied in this course. Your proposal should include a flowchart of the current process, a breakdown of the identified inefficiencies, and a detailed action plan that outlines how the proposed automation will resolve these issues.
constraints: Participants must include at least three tools learned in the course and provide justification for the choice of tools. Proposals should be no longer than 1000 words and must include visual elements like flowcharts.
example_prompt: Analyze the workflow for handling customer inquiries in your organization. Identify at least three inefficiencies and propose an automation solution including the tools you would use.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive analysis document that includes the current workflow, identified bottlenecks, graphical flowchart representation, and a detailed automation solution plan, demonstrating expert understanding of business processes and automation principles.

title: Designing an Automated Workflow for Customer Support
description: Develop a comprehensive automated workflow for a customer support team that handles inquiries through multiple channels (email, chat, and social media). The workflow should prioritize requests based on customer urgency, streamline responses using AI chatbots, and integrate ticketing systems to track resolutions. Include specific automation tools and methodologies you would use throughout the process.
constraints: The workflow must incorporate at least three automation tools, address different types of customer inquiries, and specify how data will be analyzed to improve support processes.
example_prompt: Create an automated system for a fictional company that receives inquiries via email, chat, and social media. Include the types of inquiries, response templates, escalation processes, and tools used.
expected_outcome: A detailed outline of the automated workflow, including tools, process steps, decision-making criteria, and a plan for continuous improvement based on data analysis.

title: Automating Sales Lead Management
description: In this challenge, you will design an automated workflow for managing sales leads using a CRM tool. The workflow should include data entry from web forms, automatic email notifications to sales representatives, and regular follow-ups based on lead status. This exercise will enhance your understanding of how to streamline lead management processes effectively through automation.
constraints: Your workflow must include at least three automation steps, utilize a popular CRM system, and provide documentation for implementation. It should address potential challenges such as data duplication and lead prioritization.
example_prompt: Create an automated workflow in HubSpot for handling new sales leads from a website contact form, including follow-ups and reporting.
expected_outcome: A detailed outline of the automation steps, including screenshots or diagrams of the proposed workflow, as well as explanations of how each step aids in efficiency and lead management.

title: Identifying Automation Opportunities in Small Businesses
description: In this challenge, students will analyze a fictional small business scenario to identify at least three areas where automation can significantly improve efficiency. They will present their findings along with the expected impact of each automation solution on the business's operations and productivity.
constraints: Students must choose a small business sector (e.g., retail, services, or manufacturing) and should base their analysis on given data such as customer service, inventory management, or bookkeeping tasks. Each automation opportunity should include a brief explanation of the tool or method proposed.
example_prompt: Analyze the business scenario of 'Joyful Bakery', which struggles with managing customer orders, tracking inventory, and sending invoices. Identify three automation opportunities and explain how they could benefit the bakery.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a structured analysis that outlines three areas for automation, detailing the tools or methods to be used and the expected benefits for the fictional small business.

title: Automating Sales Lead Management
description: In this challenge, students are tasked with designing an automated system for managing sales leads. The system must be capable of tracking lead interactions, scoring leads based on engagement, and sending follow-up emails based on predefined criteria, all integrated within a chosen CRM tool.
constraints: Students must use at least one automation tool (e.g., Zapier, Integromat) and a CRM of their choice. The solution should include a flowchart diagram of the automated process and a brief description of each component's function.
example_prompt: Create an automated lead management process using Zapier and HubSpot that tracks lead engagement, scores leads based on their activities, and sends tailored follow-up emails triggered by specific actions.
expected_outcome: A detailed flowchart illustrating the automated lead management process, a written explanation of each step within the automation, and documented criteria for lead scoring and email triggers.

title: Design a Basic Automated Workflow for Order Processing
description: In this challenge, students will create a simple automated workflow for processing customer orders in a fictional online store. The workflow should outline each step from order placement to fulfillment, detailing the tools and technologies they would use to automate communication and data handling for efficiency.
constraints: The proposed workflow must include at least three automated steps and specify the tools (e.g., Zapier, email automation) to be used at each stage. Consider order confirmation, updates, and customer feedback collection.
example_prompt: Design an automated workflow for handling customer orders that includes automated order confirmation emails, a process for updating inventory, and a way to gather customer feedback after fulfillment. Specify the tools you would use for each step.
expected_outcome: Students should produce a clear workflow diagram or step-by-step description detailing how the order processing will be automated, including the specific tools and methods for automation at each step.

title: Automating Invoice Processing with RPA
description: Design an automation solution for processing invoices using Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tools. Students should outline the steps to identify key data points from invoices, automate data entry into an accounting system, and generate notifications for invoice approval. The goal is to reduce the time spent on manual entry and minimize errors.
constraints: 1. Must use RPA platform (e.g., UiPath, Blue Prism) for automation. 2. Include at least 3 data validation steps to ensure accuracy. 3. Provide a flowchart of the automation process.
example_prompt: Create a flowchart and a brief overview of how you would implement an RPA solution to automate the invoice processing for a small business. Specify the tools you would use and the validation steps included.
expected_outcome: A detailed flowchart showing the automation workflow, along with a written explanation of the RPA implementation, including chosen software, key data points, and validation methods.

title: Automating a Customer Support Workflow
description: Design and implement an automated system that manages customer support requests using a combination of tools like Zapier, Google Sheets, and an email service provider. You need to create workflows that automatically categorize, assign, and track responses to customer inquiries, demonstrating efficiency in handling customer issues without manual intervention.
constraints: Utilize at least three different automation tools, ensure the system can handle at least ten simultaneous requests, and include error handling for failed automations.
example_prompt: Create a workflow that takes a new customer inquiry submitted via a web form, logs it into Google Sheets, assigns it to the appropriate support agent based on the category, and sends an acknowledgment email to the customer automatically.
expected_outcome: A fully functional automation workflow that categorizes, assigns, and tracks customer support requests, along with documentation explaining the setup and the logic behind your choices.

title: Automate the Invoice Approval Process
description: In this challenge, you will design an automated workflow for the invoice approval process in a fictitious company. The goal is to implement a system that minimizes manual entry and accelerates approval times, ensuring that invoices are reviewed and approved efficiently.
constraints: You must utilize at least two different automation tools (e.g., Zapier, Microsoft Power Automate) and outline the steps and triggers for each. The workflow must be documented clearly and include error handling mechanisms for common issues such as invoice discrepancies.
example_prompt: Design a workflow that automatically routes invoices from receipt to final approval using Zapier and Google Sheets. Outline the triggers and actions, including how to handle a situation where an invoice exceeds budget limits.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive workflow diagram, step-by-step documentation of the automation process, and a brief report (1-2 pages) explaining how the system improves efficiency and reduces manual workload in handling invoices.

title: Automate Your Daily Task Management
description: Design a simple task automation system that helps manage daily assignments in a fictional business scenario. You will need to identify two repetitive tasks that could benefit from automation, select an appropriate tool or platform, and outline a basic workflow to integrate automation into those tasks.
constraints: Your solution should include at least one digital tool (e.g., Trello, Asana, or Zapier) and outline a basic automation workflow. Provide a flowchart or step-by-step guide for implementation that can be easily followed by someone new to the concepts of automation.
example_prompt: Identify at least two daily tasks in a fictional marketing department, such as scheduling social media posts and sending weekly progress reports. Use Zapier to automate these tasks and outline the process in a flowchart.
expected_outcome: Students should produce a clear workflow diagram and describe how the automation will improve efficiency, including specific tools used and the benefits of automating those tasks.

title: Design an Automated Business Process Flow
description: Create a detailed automation plan for a business process of your choice. Identify a specific manual task within a business function (such as sales order processing, customer support, or inventory management) and design a system that automates it using appropriate tools and methodologies discussed in this course. Be sure to outline the software solutions, integration steps, data flow, and potential challenges in your plan.
constraints: 1. The automated process must address a real business pain point. 2. Include diagrams (flowcharts or BPMN) to illustrate the current vs. proposed state. 3. Justify your tool choices with at least three reasons. 4. Provide a timeline for implementation phases. 5. Keep the plan within 1500 words.
example_prompt: You could choose to automate the customer inquiry response process in a retail business. Outline the current process, design an automated solution using a chatbot and CRM integration, and detail the benefits it will bring to operational efficiency.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive automation plan that provides clear steps on how to transition from a manual to an automated process, including justifications for chosen technologies and a visual representation of the process flow.

title: Automate Invoice Processing System
description: Design and implement an automated workflow for processing and managing invoices in a small business. Your solution should integrate a tool such as Zapier or Integromat with an existing accounting platform to streamline the data entry, approval, and record-keeping processes while reducing manual input and errors.
constraints: The solution must utilize at least two automation tools and include steps for both data extraction from invoices (using OCR or a similar technology) and data entry into the chosen accounting software. The workflow should also account for notification mechanisms for invoice approval.
example_prompt: Create a Zapier workflow that triggers on new email attachments, extracts invoice data using OCR, and updates the corresponding fields in the accounting software while sending alerts for approvals.
expected_outcome: A functional automated workflow that reduces processing time and error rate in handling invoices, including flowcharts and documentation explaining each step of the process.

title: Automate Your Daily Task List
description: Create an automated workflow that collects your daily tasks from an input source (like an email or a simple form) and organizes them into a prioritized list using a spreadsheet. Your solution should include triggers and actions that demonstrate the principles of workflow automation learned in class.
constraints: Students must use at least two different automation tools (e.g., Zapier, Google Apps Script) and include a clear demonstration of the workflow in action. The task list must be updated daily based on new inputs.
example_prompt: Using Zapier, set up an automation that takes tasks from a Google Form submission, prioritizes them based on specific keywords (e.g., 'urgent', 'later'), and populates a Google Sheets document accordingly.
expected_outcome: An automated system that takes incoming task data from an input source, organizes it in a specified order, and outputs this to a spreadsheet, demonstrating clear steps and the use of automation tools.

title: Design an Automated Order Processing System
description: Create a comprehensive automated order processing system for a fictional e-commerce business. Your system should include a user interface for order placement, a backend to manage inventory and order tracking, and integration with payment processing systems. Consider how automation can minimize human intervention and streamline operations from order to fulfillment.
constraints: Your design should leverage at least two automation tools or methodologies discussed in the course. Include flowcharts, diagrams, or pseudocode to illustrate the system architecture. Make sure to address scalability and potential bottlenecks in your design.
example_prompt: Design a flowchart for your automated order processing system that includes user interactions, backend processing, and payment confirmation. Identify which components can be automated using tools like Zapier or online payment gateways.
expected_outcome: A detailed system design that visually represents the order processing workflow, including automated decision points and data handling mechanisms. A brief explanation of how your chosen tools and methods will improve efficiency and reduce manual workload should also be included.

title: Automating Invoice Processing with RPA Tools
description: Design an automation workflow for processing invoices in a business. Use a Robotic Process Automation (RPA) tool to create a step-by-step guide on how to extract data from invoices, validate the information against purchase orders, and update the finance system. Your workflow should include error handling and notification mechanisms to ensure smooth operations.
constraints: The solution must utilize at least one RPA tool (e.g., UiPath, Automation Anywhere) and cover data extraction, validation, and system updates. Include diagrams to illustrate the workflow steps and a brief summary of potential challenges and solutions.
example_prompt: Create a workflow diagram using UiPath that illustrates how to automate the invoice processing. Include steps for data extraction from PDF invoices, matching with purchase orders in Excel, and updating the ERP system after validation.
expected_outcome: A complete automation workflow diagram with annotated steps and explanations, including a written summary of best practices for reducing errors in invoice processing.

title: Automate a Simple Business Task Using a Workflow Tool
description: In this challenge, you will select a common manual task in a business setting, such as data entry or email follow-up, and create a simple automated workflow using a tool like Zapier or Microsoft Power Automate. Your task is to clearly outline the steps taken to identify the task, set up the automation, and describe how this will improve efficiency in the workplace.
constraints: Choose a task that does not require advanced coding skills. The automation should involve at least two applications/tools and include clear documentation of each step taken to set up the workflow.
example_prompt: Automate the process of adding new leads from a Google Sheet into a CRM system using Zapier.
expected_outcome: A documented workflow showing the task selected, the steps to create the automation, a brief explanation of how it works, and the expected benefits in terms of time saved and efficiency improved.

title: Market Opportunity Analysis for a New Product
description: Conduct a detailed market opportunity analysis for a hypothetical tech product aimed at enhancing remote team collaboration. Use market research methodologies to identify trends, customer needs, and competitive landscape. Provide a report that summarizes your findings and suggests strategic recommendations for product positioning and feature prioritization.
constraints: Your analysis must include at least three different sources of market data (e.g., surveys, industry reports, competitor analysis). Clearly outline the market size, target customer segments, and potential barriers to entry. Your report should not exceed 5 pages.
example_prompt: Analyze the market opportunity for a new collaborative software tool intended for remote teams. Identify key trends, customer pain points, and potential competitors using available data sources. Summarize your findings in a clear, structured report.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive market analysis report that outlines the potential for the new product, including strategic recommendations on positioning and features based on the identified market needs and competitive landscape.

title: Market Opportunity Identification
description: In this challenge, participants will conduct market research to identify a potential product opportunity within a specified industry. Students will use tools such as SWOT analysis and customer personas to outline their findings and justify the product opportunity. This exercise will help students practice critical elements of product strategy formulation by focusing on data-driven decision-making.
constraints: Students must select an industry from a provided list and focus on consumer needs within that domain. The analysis should include at least one SWOT analysis and two customer personas. Submissions should be in a written format, not exceeding 1,000 words.
example_prompt: Identify a market opportunity in the health and wellness industry. Conduct a SWOT analysis and create two detailed customer personas that illustrate potential target customers for the product you propose.
expected_outcome: A structured analysis detailing the identified market opportunity, supported by the completed SWOT analysis and customer personas, demonstrating an understanding of market dynamics and strategic alignment with product vision.

title: Develop a Comprehensive Product Launch Strategy
description: Create a detailed product launch strategy for a hypothetical tech product in a competitive market. Your strategy should include market analysis, target audience identification, key performance indicators (KPIs), and a timeline for execution. Be sure to align your teams effectively to ensure a successful launch.
constraints: Your strategy must include at least three market analysis methods, a well-defined target audience persona, specific KPIs to track success, and a realistic execution timeline broken down into phases. Include potential risks and mitigation strategies.
example_prompt: Imagine you are launching a new productivity app aimed at remote teams. Develop a comprehensive product launch strategy that covers all the required elements.
expected_outcome: A well-structured document outlining the product launch strategy, demonstrating an understanding of market dynamics, audience engagement, and execution planning, complete with analysis, persona details, KPIs, timeline, and risk assessment.

title: Market Opportunity Analysis for New Product Launch
description: As a product manager, you are tasked with identifying a market opportunity for a new product in a competitive landscape. Conduct a thorough market analysis that includes identifying target customer segments, competitive products, and potential market trends. Use the provided data set and case study to support your analysis and recommendation for product strategy.
constraints: Your analysis must include at least 3 customer segments, 2 competitive products, and 2 market trends. You should also provide a SWOT analysis for the proposed product concept. Use at least one data visualization to illustrate market potential.
example_prompt: Using the data set provided, identify and analyze a market opportunity for a wearable health tech product. Take into consideration customer demographics and preferences from the case study included in the course materials.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive market analysis report that outlines customer segments, competitive landscape, market trends, and a SWOT analysis. The report should offer clear recommendations for product positioning based on your findings.

title: Identify and Define a Product Opportunity
description: In this challenge, you will conduct a simple market analysis to identify a potential product opportunity within a given industry. You will create a product vision statement that addresses a specific customer need and outline how this vision aligns with your defined market opportunity.
constraints: You must select an industry from the following options: healthcare, education, or e-commerce. Your product vision statement should be no more than 100 words and must clearly articulate the target customer, their need, and how your product addresses this need.
example_prompt: Choose the e-commerce industry and identify a product opportunity for young professionals seeking sustainable living options. Create a product vision statement summarizing your idea.
expected_outcome: A clear product vision statement that identifies a target customer, articulates their need, and explains how the proposed product addresses this need within the selected industry.

title: Developing a Multi-Channel Go-To-Market Strategy
description: In this challenge, students are tasked with developing a comprehensive go-to-market strategy for a fictional product. Participants must identify the target market, select appropriate marketing channels, and outline key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure success. This exercise focuses on practical application of market opportunity assessment and team alignment essential for effective product delivery.
constraints: The strategy must include at least three distinct marketing channels, a detailed customer persona, and a clear list of KPIs. Students should utilize frameworks learned in the course such as SWOT analysis and the business model canvas.
example_prompt: You are launching a new fitness tracking app designed for busy professionals. Create a go-to-market strategy that identifies your target audience, selects marketing channels (e.g. social media, email, influencers), and outlines specific KPIs to measure effectiveness of your strategy.
expected_outcome: An organized strategy document that includes an overview of the chosen target market, detailed descriptions of the selected marketing channels, a well-defined customer persona, and a list of KPIs with their measurement methods.

title: Market Opportunity Identification and Product Vision Development
description: In this challenge, you will analyze a selected market segment to identify a key opportunity for a new product. Based on your analysis, create a clear product vision statement that outlines how your product will address the identified market gap. Your submission should include market data, customer insights, and a persuasive vision statement.
constraints: Select a specific market segment. Use at least three credible sources for market data. Your product vision should be concise (maximum 100 words) and directly linked to the identified opportunity.
example_prompt: Choose a market segment such as health tech, and research the current trends and gaps in products aimed at seniors. Develop a product vision for a wearable device that addresses these gaps.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive market analysis report (1-2 pages) outlining the identified opportunity with supporting data, followed by a succinct product vision statement.

title: Market Opportunity Analysis for a New Product
description: Identify a potential market opportunity for a new product based on a given set of customer needs and competitive landscape. Create a brief product strategy statement that includes target market, product vision, and value proposition, using the concepts learned in 'Product Strategy & Execution Essentials'.
constraints: Provide a 200-300 word response that outlines your chosen market opportunity, target customer segment, and articulates a clear product vision and value proposition. Use at least two specific customer insights from the provided data set.
example_prompt: Given the customer feedback data on home fitness equipment, analyze the unmet needs in the market and propose a new fitness product that addresses these needs. Clearly state your target market and how your product will stand out from competitors.
expected_outcome: A concise market opportunity analysis that identifies a clear customer segment and articulates a product vision, along with a distinctive value proposition that highlights how the new product will meet customer needs effectively.

title: Developing a Go-to-Market Strategy for a New Product
description: In this challenge, you will create a comprehensive go-to-market strategy for a hypothetical innovative product in a competitive market. This strategy should include market analysis, target customer identification, positioning, pricing strategy, and a detailed execution plan involving cross-functional team alignment. Your plan should effectively demonstrate how to leverage market opportunities while ensuring all teams understand their roles in bringing the product to market successfully.
constraints: Your strategy must cover at least three key components: market analysis, customer segmentation, and an execution timeline. Limit your response to 2000 words, and ensure that your strategy is based on realistic market data and examples. Include visuals like charts or graphs where applicable.
example_prompt: Create a go-to-market strategy for a new eco-friendly smartphone targeting millennials, considering market trends and team roles.
expected_outcome: A detailed go-to-market strategy document that clearly outlines the market opportunity, customer segments, positioning, pricing, and execution alignment for successful product launch.

title: Conducting a Competitive Analysis for Product Strategy
description: In this challenge, students will conduct a competitive analysis for a hypothetical new product in a chosen market. They will identify key competitors, analyze their strengths and weaknesses, and propose strategic recommendations based on their findings to align product vision with market needs.
constraints: Students must analyze at least 3 competitors, use specific market data or reports (indicate sources), and focus on at least 5 key factors such as pricing, features, market positioning, and customer feedback.
example_prompt: Choose a market (e.g., tech gadgets, app development, etc.) and a hypothetical product. Analyze at least three competitors in that space. What strengths and weaknesses do they have? Based on your analysis, suggest how your product can differentiate itself in the market.
expected_outcome: A detailed competitive analysis report that includes a summary of competitors, a SWOT analysis for each competitor, and strategic recommendations for positioning the new product effectively.

title: Define a Product Vision Statement
description: In this challenge, you will create a product vision statement for a new product idea you’ve identified. Your vision statement should encapsulate the overall purpose of your product, the target audience, and the value it provides. Focus on clarity and inspiration to effectively communicate your product's direction and ambition.
constraints: Your vision statement should be no longer than 2-3 sentences. Include key elements: target audience, product purpose, and value proposition. Ensure it is written in a motivational tone that aligns with common best practices in product strategy.
example_prompt: Imagine you want to create a new fitness app aimed at busy professionals. Draft a product vision statement that articulates the target audience, purpose, and unique value of your app.
expected_outcome: A clear and inspiring product vision statement that reflects the essential components of product strategy as learned in this course.

title: Crafting an Effective Reasoning Prompt
description: Your task is to create a clear and effective prompt that encourages an AI to engage in logical reasoning. Start with a general topic of your choice and formulate a question that requires the AI to analyze information and provide a reasoned conclusion. Remember to keep your prompt concise while still being specific enough to guide the AI's response.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 25 words and should avoid technical jargon to ensure clarity.
example_prompt: What are the reasons for climate change and its potential impacts on global weather patterns?
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a list of reasons for climate change along with logical explanations of how these contribute to changes in weather patterns.

title: AI Integration Roadmap for Small Enterprises
description: Create a clear and concise roadmap for integrating AI solutions in a hypothetical small business. Consider factors such as budget, time frame, team structure, and the specific AI technologies that would benefit different departments. This challenge helps beginners understand the strategic aspects of deploying AI at scale in a manageable way.
constraints: Your roadmap must be limited to 500 words and should include at least three AI technologies catering to different business functions. Use a friendly, informative tone suitable for a business audience.
example_prompt: Develop a roadmap for a small retail business looking to implement AI for customer service, inventory management, and marketing. Include timelines and potential challenges.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a structured, easy-to-follow roadmap outlining steps for integrating selected AI technologies, highlighting benefits and potential obstacles for the business.

title: Summarize Complex Code Structures
description: Your task is to create a prompt that summarizes complex code structures from a given set of programming languages. The summary should capture key functionalities, architectural patterns, and usage of libraries/frameworks while preserving essential details and avoiding excessive jargon.
constraints: The summary must be between 100-150 words, use technical terms appropriately, and maintain a professional tone suitable for an audience with programming experience.
example_prompt: "Please summarize the following JavaScript function that implements a recursive algorithm for calculating Fibonacci numbers. Include its structure, key elements, and any important JavaScript features utilized in the code."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a concise summary that highlights the Fibonacci function's recursion, key JavaScript features (like closures or spread syntax), and any notable design patterns used within the implementation.

title: Develop a Comprehensive Product Launch Campaign Plan
description: Create a detailed marketing prompt that outlines a product launch campaign for a new eco-friendly gadget. Your task is to incorporate various marketing channels, such as social media, email marketing, and influencer partnerships, while ensuring the content aligns with the brand's sustainability values. Consider the target audience, messaging, and KPIs for measuring success.
constraints: The prompt must be between 150-200 words, include a tone that is engaging and persuasive, and specify at least three distinct marketing channels to be used.
example_prompt: Generate a marketing plan for launching 'EcoGadget', an innovative solar-powered charger aimed at eco-conscious consumers, with a focus on social media engagement, partnerships with sustainability influencers, and an email marketing strategy that highlights the product's unique features and brand mission.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a cohesive product launch plan that includes an actionable timeline, target audience analysis, messaging strategies, and KPIs to assess the effectiveness of the campaign.

title: Crafting Engaging Story Prompts
description: In this challenge, you will create a series of three engaging story prompts that can inspire a creative writing piece. Your prompts should have a clear theme, setting, and a character outline. Think about how to spark creativity while also providing enough detail to guide the narrative.
constraints: Each prompt must be between 20-50 words, include at least one character, a setting, and a conflict or goal. Use an encouraging and imaginative tone.
example_prompt: Write a prompt that begins with: 'In a bustling market, a young girl discovers...'.
expected_outcome: The AI should respond with three distinct story prompts based on your guidelines, each offering a unique narrative opportunity.

title: Multi-Layered Summarization of Complex Systems
description: Design a prompt that effectively summarizes a multi-layered, complex system involving interdependencies, dynamic interactions, and feedback loops. The AI should extract key insights and articulate them in a coherent and engaging manner that captures the essence of the system while maintaining a clear structure.
constraints: The summary must not exceed 300 words, must be formatted with clear headings for each layer of the system, and should adopt a formal, informative tone.
example_prompt: Summarize the key components of the ecosystem services framework, highlighting the interactions between ecological, social, and economic layers. Include insights into how feedback loops influence these layers and their implications for sustainability.
expected_outcome: An articulate summary that identifies and describes each layer of the ecosystem services framework, presents the interdependencies clearly, and offers insights into the importance of feedback mechanisms in sustainability efforts.

title: Designing a Conversational Interface for Complex Query Resolution
description: Create a comprehensive product design proposal for a conversational AI interface that can handle complex multi-step queries in various industries. The design should include user persona analysis, interaction flow diagrams, and recommendations for structuring the AI's reasoning capabilities to ensure accurate and logical responses. Consideration of edge cases and error handling must be prominently included.
constraints: Limit the proposal to 2000 words, focusing on clarity and technical feasibility. Use formal tone and visualize key components with diagrams where applicable.
example_prompt: Design an AI-driven customer service interface that can resolve a user's inquiry involving multiple services and decision points, detailing the steps the user would take and the corresponding AI responses at each stage.
expected_outcome: A detailed product design document that outlines the user experience, technical architecture, and logical reasoning paths to ensure robust handling of complex queries in a conversational format.

title: Precision Prompt Construction for AI Response Optimization
description: In this challenge, you are required to design a complex multi-part prompt aimed at eliciting highly specific and relevant responses from an AI model. The prompt should effectively guide the AI in generating an output that demonstrates advanced reasoning and contextual understanding in a given scenario. You'll need to evaluate the effectiveness of your prompt through iterative testing and refine it based on the quality of the AI's responses.
constraints: The prompt must include at least three distinct components that demonstrate logical coherence, contain no more than 150 words, and maintain a professional yet engaging tone suitable for academic discourse.
example_prompt: "Considering the implications of climate change on global economies, outline a strategic plan that includes three specific policy recommendations for governments, detailing how each policy could be operationalized to maximize economic resilience and sustainability over the next decade."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed, structured response that addresses the prompt components clearly, showcasing a high level of analytical thought and contextual relevance in its strategic recommendations.

title: Summarizing a News Article Effectively
description: In this challenge, you will write a prompt to summarize a news article of your choice. Your goal is to create a clear and concise summary that captures the main points and key details of the article while keeping the language simple and accessible for a general audience.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 20 words and should specify that the summary should be 3-5 sentences long, in a neutral tone.
example_prompt: Summarize the main points of the following news article in 3-5 sentences: [insert news article text].
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a summary that includes the key facts and insights from the article, presented clearly and succinctly.

title: Designing an AI-Enhanced User Experience for Smart Home Devices
description: Create a comprehensive design proposal for a new smart home device that leverages AI to enhance user experience. Your proposal should include user personas, key features driven by AI technologies, and an innovative design concept that addresses specific user pain points in home automation.
constraints: Your proposal must not exceed 1500 words, include at least three user personas, one detailed feature description utilizing AI, and must be presented in a professional format suitable for stakeholders.
example_prompt: Design a new AI-driven product that optimizes energy efficiency in smart homes. Include user personas, feature descriptions, and a visual layout of the product interface.
expected_outcome: A well-structured design proposal that articulates the AI integration in the smart home device, supported by data-driven insights about user personas and their needs, leading to an innovative and user-friendly product design.

title: Crafting a Marketing Persona Prompt
description: In this challenge, you will create a prompt designed to generate a detailed marketing persona for a hypothetical product. Your persona should encompass demographics, preferences, challenges, and motivations to help inform targeted marketing strategies. This exercise will test your ability to employ specific attributes and thoughtful questions in your prompt design.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, should include at least 5 specific attributes to detail in the persona, and maintain a conversational and engaging tone.
example_prompt: 'Design a marketing persona for a new organic snack brand that targets health-conscious millennials. Include their age, gender, lifestyle, values, and purchasing motivations. What are their primary challenges when choosing snacks?'
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive marketing persona with clear details about demographics, preferences, and motivations that align with the product described, offering insights for marketing campaigns.

title: Designing a Multi-Agent Workflow Automation System Using AI
description: In this challenge, you are tasked with creating a series of AI prompts designed to facilitate a robust multi-agent system that automates complex workflows within an organization. The prompts must enable seamless communication between AI agents to optimize operations, reduce human intervention, and deliver measurable outcomes aligned with specific organizational goals.
constraints: Prompts should be in JSON format, not exceed 200 words each, must specify agent roles, context, and desired outcomes; tone should be highly technical and professional.
example_prompt: { 'agent_roles': ['Data Collector', 'Processing Engine', 'Decision Maker'], 'context': 'Automate the reporting process for monthly sales data.', 'desired_outcome': 'Generate reports summarizing sales trends, insights, and recommendations.' }
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a set of cohesive prompts that guarantee effective interaction between agents, ensuring that they can autonomously execute their tasks and deliver accurate reports that meet management's criteria for success.

title: Create a Multi-Channel Marketing Campaign Generator
description: Design a prompt that generates a comprehensive marketing campaign tailored for a specific product and target demographic, utilizing diverse channels such as social media, email, and content marketing. The prompt should encourage the AI to consider current trends, target audience psychographics, and measurable KPIs for campaign success.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 150 words, should specify the type of product and target demographic, and must request at least 3 distinct marketing channels. The tone should be professional and engaging, making use of marketing jargon appropriately.
example_prompt: Generate a marketing campaign for a new eco-friendly skincare product aimed at millennials, utilizing social media, email newsletters, and influencer partnerships. Include key messages, potential influencers, and metrics for success.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed marketing campaign plan that includes strategies for each of the specified channels, recommended content themes, potential KPIs to track effectiveness, and a cohesive messaging strategy that resonates with the target demographic.

title: Automate Your Email Campaigns with Personalized Outreach
description: In this challenge, you will create a prompt that generates a series of email templates for a marketing campaign aimed at different customer segments. Your task is to ensure each email resonates with the target audience by incorporating personalized elements related to their preferences and behaviors. You will need to consider the tone and language suitable for each segment.
constraints: Each email template must not exceed 150 words, should follow a professional yet engaging tone, and include at least three personalized elements such as the recipient's name, past purchase, or interaction history.
example_prompt: Create an email template for a marketing campaign targeting first-time buyers of eco-friendly products, including their name, a discount offer for next purchase, and a recommendation based on their recent interest in sustainable living.
expected_outcome: The AI should output three distinct email templates tailored for different customer segments, each containing personalized content that speaks directly to the interests and engagement levels of the recipients.

title: Crafting a Brand Story through AI-Generated Testimonials
description: For this challenge, create a series of three AI-generated customer testimonials that narrate a compelling brand story for a fictional product. Each testimonial should highlight unique features of the product and portray different customer perspectives, effectively showcasing its value. Use this exercise to demonstrate how nuanced prompts can shape creative outputs that resonate with target audiences.
constraints: Each testimonial should be between 50-100 words, utilize a conversational tone, and avoid jargon. Ensure the product aligns with a specific market (e.g., eco-friendly products, tech gadgets).
example_prompt: Generate three testimonials for a fictional eco-friendly water bottle named 'EcoSip', incorporating different customer voices: a fitness enthusiast, a busy parent, and a college student.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce three distinctive testimonials that reflect authentic customer experiences with 'EcoSip', highlighting its eco-friendly features, usability, and impact on their daily lives.

title: Dynamic Workflow Automation Design
description: Design a prompt that enables an AI to create, manage, and modify automated workflows for a multi-department organization. The challenge is to ensure that the prompt can cater to dynamic changes in departmental needs and priorities, allowing the AI to adjust workflows in real-time based on incoming data and user feedback.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words, should encourage clarity and specificity in workflow requirements, and must allow for real-time updates. Tone should be professional and instructional.
example_prompt: "You are tasked with creating an automated workflow for the customer support department. The workflow should integrate with our existing CRM system, allow for escalation to management when necessary, and incorporate feedback loops to continually improve response effectiveness. What steps will you outline to build this automated process?"
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a structured outline of an automated workflow, detailing step-by-step processes, user roles, tools required, and methods for adapting the workflow based on real-time feedback.

title: Dynamic Logical Deduction Game
description: Create a coding challenge where participants must develop a function that processes a series of logical statements involving multiple variables and returns true or false based on a provided query. The challenge should require participants to create a multi-step reasoning chain, handling contradictions and dependencies in the input statements.
constraints: The solution must be implemented in Python, and the function should handle at least 10 unique statements with complex logical connections. The code must include comprehensive unit tests that cover edge cases and expected behaviors.
example_prompt: Develop a function `evaluate_statements(statements: List[str], query: str) -> bool` that evaluates provided logical statements and answers the query based on the outcomes of the statements.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python function that correctly evaluates logical statements and can handle interdependencies, contradictions, and multiple variable conditions, along with a suite of unit tests that validate the implementation.

title: Expert AI Dialogue Automation for Clarity and Engagement
description: Design a sophisticated automated dialogue system that fosters engaging conversations with users while maintaining clarity and precision. Your challenge is to create prompts that effectively guide a user through a complex topic, ensuring that the AI not only provides accurate information but also adapts its tone and complexity based on user responses and engagement levels.
constraints: Prompts must be between 50-100 words, must incorporate user response analysis for tone adjustment, and should utilize advanced conversational techniques (e.g., active listening, clarification prompts).
example_prompt: Create a dialogue script that begins with a user asking about AI in healthcare. The AI should evaluate the user's input for complexity and engagement, adjusting its responses accordingly to provide a tailored experience.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a flowing, interactive conversation that demonstrates understanding, adaptiveness, and clarity in explaining AI applications in healthcare, thereby achieving a meaningful exchange with the user.

title: Crafting a Marketing Campaign Prompt
description: Design a prompt that elicits creative marketing campaign ideas for a new eco-friendly product. The campaign should target environmentally conscious consumers and include social media strategies. Emphasize clarity and specificity in your prompt to ensure the generated ideas are actionable and aligned with the brand's values.
constraints: Max 150 words; the tone should be engaging and marketing-focused; include specific request for platforms and content type.
example_prompt: Generate a marketing campaign for a new eco-friendly water bottle targeting millennials on Instagram. Include innovative post ideas, hashtags, and engagement strategies that resonate with environmentally conscious consumers.
expected_outcome: A detailed marketing campaign proposal that includes at least three unique social media post ideas, suggested hashtags, and metrics for measuring engagement, all aligned with the eco-friendly theme.

title: AI-Driven Product Concept Generator
description: Design a Python application that leverages machine learning techniques to generate innovative product concepts tailored to a specific market need. The application should take user input about target demographics and industry trends, then output a set of product ideas, including a brief description, potential features, and estimated market impact based on analysis of existing products.
constraints: The application must use at least one machine learning library (such as TensorFlow or PyTorch), limit each product concept to a maximum of 150 words, and provide meaningful insights backed by data analysis. Code must be well-documented and structured for scalability.
example_prompt: Create an AI product concept generator that focuses on sustainable consumer goods for millennials. The app should analyze current trends in sustainability and provide at least five unique product ideas.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python application that generates novel product concepts, each including a title, description, key features, and a brief insight on market viability. User inputs should meaningfully influence the generated concepts based on training data.

title: Crafting a Multi-User Feedback Analysis Prompt
description: Design a complex AI prompt that enables a product design team to analyze user feedback from multiple sources (such as surveys, social media, and direct interviews) and extract actionable insights for improving a product. Your prompt should guide the AI to categorize feedback by sentiment, relevance, and frequency, ensuring clarity and usability of the result.
