constraints: The prompt must be between 50-75 words, focus on three specific user personas, and include at least two pain points for each persona that the product will address.
example_prompt: 'Design a smart kitchen appliance for three user personas: a busy parent, a college student, and a health-conscious individual. Address their unique needs and pain points in your design, emphasizing convenience and efficiency.'
expected_outcome: A comprehensive product design concept that addresses the specified user personas and effectively resolves their identified pain points while being innovative and user-friendly.

title: Create an Optimized Prompt for Code Generation
description: In this challenge, you will design a clear and specific prompt to generate a basic Python function that calculates the factorial of a number. Your task is to make sure that the prompt encourages the AI to deliver the best possible code, focusing on clarity and functionality. Remember to consider how the wording of your prompt influences the quality of the generated output.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 25 words, must clearly specify the expected input, and should ask for example usage of the generated code.
example_prompt: Write a Python function that calculates the factorial of a given number and includes an example of how to call this function.
expected_outcome: A Python function that calculates the factorial of a number along with a demonstration of how to use the function properly, including error handling for invalid input.

title: Designing a User-Centric Product Concept
description: In this challenge, you will create a prompt that generates a detailed product concept designed to solve a specific user problem. Your prompt should encourage the AI to consider user experience, market trends, and potential functionalities, while emphasizing innovation and practicality.
constraints: The prompt must be under 150 words, focus on a specific user problem, and incorporate requirements for product usability and aesthetics.
example_prompt: Generate a product concept for a sustainable kitchen appliance that reduces food waste. Describe the key features, target audience, and how it enhances user experience.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive product concept that includes product name, description, key features, target demographic, and user benefits, while demonstrating an understanding of sustainability and innovation in design.

title: Automated Incident Response Prompt Design
description: Design a series of prompts for an AI that automates the incident response process in a cyber security framework. These prompts must gather necessary information from the user while ensuring clarity and specificity to facilitate the automation of threat analysis and resolution.
constraints: Prompts must not exceed 50 words each, include at least three different styles (e.g. interrogative, imperative, open-ended), and maintain a professional tone suitable for cybersecurity professionals.
example_prompt: "What type of incident has occurred? Please describe the impact on the system and any immediate actions taken."
expected_outcome: A structured set of five prompts that efficiently gathers user input for each phase of the incident response process, clearly demonstrating the capability to tailor the interaction based on user input for effective automated processing.

title: Designing User-Centric Product Prompts
description: Create a prompt that guides an AI to generate a comprehensive product design brief for a fictional smart home device. The prompt should encourage detailed user personas, usability scenarios, and aesthetic considerations, reflecting a deep understanding of user needs and market trends. Your prompt must invoke creativity while adhering to user-centered design principles.
constraints: Maximum of 150 words, should include a specific tone that encourages innovation and user-friendliness, must clearly articulate the desired output format of the brief.
example_prompt: "Create an engaging design brief for a smart home device targeting tech-savvy millennials. Include user personas, potential usage scenarios, and design preferences that consider aesthetics and usability."
expected_outcome: An AI-generated product design brief that includes detailed user personas, specific usage scenarios, design aesthetics preferences, and clear usability features for the smart home device.

title: Crafting a Compelling Marketing Campaign Prompt
description: In this challenge, you will create a prompt that generates a comprehensive marketing campaign aimed at promoting a new eco-friendly product. Your task is to ensure the prompt captures all necessary elements, including target audience analysis, key messaging, and multi-channel strategy across digital platforms. This involves thinking critically about how to phrase your queries to elicit detailed and sophisticated responses from the AI.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 150 words, should be presented in a persuasive tone, and must explicitly request insights on at least three different marketing channels.
example_prompt: "Generate a marketing campaign for a new eco-friendly laundry detergent aimed at environmentally conscious millennials. Include an analysis of the target audience, key marketing messages, and strategies for social media, email marketing, and influencer partnerships."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed marketing campaign outline that includes audience segmentation, highlights messaging tailored to the audience, and strategies for engaging them through selected marketing channels with specific examples.

title: Narrative Logic: Constructing a Cohesive Story from Disjointed Prompts
description: In this challenge, you will create a cohesive short story using at least three seemingly unrelated prompts. Each prompt must entail a different genre, forcing you to navigate various narrative styles and themes. Your story must demonstrate advanced logic by interconnecting the prompts in a meaningful way, showcasing the interplay of disparate ideas.
constraints: The story must be between 800-1200 words, include at least three distinct genres, and seamlessly integrate the prompts into a cohesive narrative.
example_prompt: 1. A space exploration mission gone wrong. 2. A mythical creature emerges in a modern city. 3. A detective solving a mystery in a quiet town.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-structured story that creatively interweaves the three prompts, demonstrating advanced reasoning and narrative cohesion. Each genre should be clearly represented, and the transitions between the different narrative styles should be smooth and logical.

title: Complex Disambiguation through Creative Scenarios
description: In this challenge, you will be tasked with creating a series of interconnected scenarios that utilize advanced reasoning techniques to clarify ambiguous concepts. Your aim is to design narratives that compel an AI to deduce meanings from nuanced prompts while engaging creatively with the subject matter. Consider incorporating themes of language evolution, cultural context, or philosophical debates to deepen complexity.
constraints: Craft a narrative of 500-700 words, ensuring at least three distinct scenarios that present ambiguous concepts; include a concluding analysis of the reasoning techniques employed.
example_prompt: Create a scenario involving an ancient artifact discovered in two different cultures, each interpreting it based on their worldviews. Explore how ambiguity in the artifact’s purpose leads to diverse narratives and engage with philosophical questions that arise from these interpretations.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a cohesive set of narratives that showcase the differing interpretations of the artifact, exemplifying advanced reasoning techniques in breaking down ambiguity and synthesizing cultural perspectives.

title: Automated Meeting Summary Generator
description: Develop a prompt that automates the generation of a concise meeting summary based on a transcript of the meeting. The summary must highlight key decisions, action items, and important discussions, while maintaining a professional tone and logical structure.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 100 words, should use a formal tone, and specify the output format as a structured list with headings for 'Decisions Made', 'Action Items', and 'Discussion Points'.
example_prompt: Based on the following meeting transcript, generate a structured summary that lists key decisions, action items, and discussion points. Ensure clarity and conciseness in your summary.
expected_outcome: A well-organized summary that clearly distinguishes between decisions, action items, and discussion points, formatted as a list with appropriate headings.

title: Concise Marketing Campaign Summarization
description: In this challenge, participants will create a prompt that instructs an AI to summarize a multi-channel marketing campaign into a concise, actionable plan. The summary should highlight key objectives, target audience insights, and performance metrics while maintaining clarity and relevance for stakeholders.
constraints: The summary must be no longer than 150 words, focused on practicality, and written in a professional tone suitable for executive reporting.
example_prompt: Summarize the recent digital marketing campaign for Product X in 150 words, focusing on its objectives, target audience insights, and key performance metrics obtained across all channels.
expected_outcome: A succinct summary that clearly outlines the marketing campaign's goals, audience engagement metrics, and overall performance results, ready for stakeholder review.

title: Automated Character Development Framework
description: Design an intricate automated framework that generates multi-dimensional characters based on user-defined parameters such as background, motivation, and relationship dynamics. This challenge requires deep integration of narrative theory and an understanding of character arcs while ensuring that the AI output aligns cohesively with the predetermined themes and tones of a story.
constraints: The framework must allow inputs for at least 5 different character traits and output a character profile in no more than 300 words. The tone of the character description should reflect the genre specified by the user (e.g., fantasy, sci-fi, romance).
example_prompt: Generate a character profile for a dark fantasy setting, focusing on a misunderstood antihero with a tragic past, cunning intelligence, and an inner conflict between loyalty and vengeance.
expected_outcome: An automated character profile that deeply explores the character's motivations, conflicts, and potential growth, while maintaining genre consistency and emotional depth.

title: Interactive User Interface for Remote Work Tools
description: Design a user interface prototype for an online collaborative tool aimed at remote teams. The interface should enhance productivity and user engagement by integrating features like task management, video conferencing, and real-time collaboration. Consider accessibility and user experience across different devices.
constraints: The design should include at least three interactive elements (e.g., buttons, sliders), high-fidelity wireframes or mockups, and a brief rationale (max 150 words) for each element's functionality.
example_prompt: Create a prototype for a remote team collaboration tool that includes a dashboard, task assignment feature, and a video call interface.
expected_outcome: A detailed prototype with labeled interactive elements and justifications, demonstrating user flow and effective design principles for collaborative work environments.

title: Automated Report Generator for Weekly Sales Analytics
description: Create a prompt that automates the generation of a weekly sales report from a provided dataset. The prompt should ask the user for input parameters such as date range, product categories, and specific metrics (e.g., total sales, average order value). The AI should generate a structured report summarizing the sales performance based on this input.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 150 words and should clearly specify the format for reporting (e.g., bullet points, tables).
example_prompt: Generate a sales report for the period from X date to Y date, focusing on categories A, B, and C. Include total sales, average order value, and top-performing products. Ensure the output is formatted in bullet points and includes at least two charts.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a clearly formatted sales report with bullet points summarizing metrics, along with visualizations such as bar or line charts representing trends over the selected period.

title: Dynamic Task Automation Template Generator
description: Develop a prompt that enables an AI to generate templates for automating repetitive tasks across different software applications based on user specifications. The prompt must guide the AI to produce clear, structured templates that can include steps, tools needed, and alternative suggestions for varied contexts.
constraints: Must be a single prompt under 150 words, include at least two examples of user inputs, and specify outputs in a structured format (e.g., bullet points or numbered lists).
example_prompt: "Generate a template for automating the report generation in Excel and scheduling an email delivery via Outlook. Include steps, tools needed, and potential variations for different data types."
expected_outcome: A structured automation template including step-by-step instructions, required tools, and alternative workflows that can be directly applied to automate the specified tasks.

title: Automated Report Generator
description: Create a prompt that generates automated monthly performance reports based on provided input data. The reports should include key metrics, visualizations, and actionable insights. The prompt must be flexible enough to accommodate different data formats and styles.
constraints: Prompt must be under 120 words and should include an example of the input data format as well as the expected structure of the report.
example_prompt: Generate a performance report for sales data over the last month. Input: {"sales": [1000, 1500, 2000], "goals": [1200, 1600, 1800]} Output structure: {"summary": "...", "visuals": [{"type": "bar", "data": [...]}, {...}], "insights": ["...", "..."]}
expected_outcome: An automated performance report that highlights sales trends, includes visual representations of the data, and provides clear, actionable insights based on the input data received.

title: Complex Decision-Making Scenario
description: Develop a multi-layered scenario in which a character must make a difficult decision. The scenario should involve at least three conflicting desires and require critical reasoning to resolve the dilemma. Additionally, provide context that affects the character's emotions and reason, leading to multiple potential outcomes based on their choice.
constraints: The prompt must be exactly 150 words, specify at least three desires, and include a backstory for the character. The character's final choice should lead to multiple real-world consequences.
example_prompt: A young entrepreneur is deciding whether to close a failing business to pursue a dream job, support his family, or remain loyal to his committed employees. Write a scenario detailing his internal conflict.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a narrative outlining the character's internal and external conflicts, the reasoning behind each desire, and potential consequences of their choice, promoting deep moral and ethical reasoning.

title: Advanced Conceptualization of Multi-Modal Interactions
description: Craft a prompt that requires the AI to analyze a complex scenario involving multiple sensory modalities (e.g., visual, auditory) and produce a cohesive narrative that seamlessly integrates these modalities. The prompt should challenge the AI to infer non-obvious connections between sensory perceptions and unexpected outcomes therein.
constraints: Max 150 words; must include at least three distinct sensory modalities; examples of unexpected outcomes required.
example_prompt: Imagine a bustling city square where a street performer is juggling, a musician is playing a lively tune, and a vendor is selling aromatic food. Describe how the combination of sound, movement, and smell influences the crowd's emotions and actions, leading to an unexpected outcome like a spontaneous dance party.
expected_outcome: A coherent narrative that synthesizes sensory inputs, illustrating the interactions between them and how they create surprising scenarios, showcasing expert-level reasoning and creativity.

title: Advanced Summarization with Contextual Awareness
description: Develop a prompt that enables the AI to summarize a complex academic paper while incorporating the author's intent, key contributions, and implications for future research. The challenge lies in maintaining the essence of the original work while keeping the summary concise and accurate.
constraints: The summary must be no more than 150 words and must include the paper's main argument, methodology, and findings. Users must provide a specific focus area for the summary, such as 'impact on future studies' or 'application in practical scenarios'.
example_prompt: Summarize the following academic paper in 150 words, focusing on the implications for future research in the field of biotechnology: [insert paper text here].
expected_outcome: A well-structured summary that clearly reflects the main argument, methodology, findings, and specific implications as requested in the prompt, demonstrating a deep understanding of the paper's content.

title: Personalized Multichannel Marketing Campaign Design
description: Develop a prompt that guides an AI to create a comprehensive multichannel marketing campaign for an emerging product in the tech industry. The campaign should incorporate strategies involving social media, email, and direct marketing while setting measurable objectives and utilizing customer data for personalization. The output should also include a timeline and budget estimates.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 150 words, should include at least three channels of marketing, and specify target audience demographics.
example_prompt: Design a multichannel marketing campaign for a new VR headset targeting tech-savvy millennials. Include strategies for social media, email newsletters, and influencer partnerships to drive engagement and sales, along with metrics to measure success.
expected_outcome: A detailed marketing campaign plan with strategies, timelines, budget estimates, and measurable objectives tailored for the specified audience.

title: Multi-Channel Marketing Strategy Development
description: Design a comprehensive multi-channel marketing strategy for a fictional company launching a new eco-friendly product line. The strategy should include target audience analysis, content ideas for social media, email, and traditional media, as well as a budget outline. Address how each channel complements the others to create a cohesive campaign.
constraints: The strategy must be at least 300 words, detailing at least three marketing channels and include specific examples of content for each channel. Budget breakdown should be included in a table format.
example_prompt: Create a multi-channel marketing strategy for GreenGadget Co., which is launching an eco-friendly smartphone accessory line. Include target audience, content ideas, budget, and how the channels will work together.
expected_outcome: A detailed marketing strategy document outlining the target audience, specific content ideas for at least three marketing channels (social media, email, and a traditional medium), and a budget breakdown in table form, demonstrating coherence among channels.

title: Complex Scenario Resolution
description: Design a prompt that requires the AI to navigate a multi-step reasoning process involving conflicting information and diverse stakeholder perspectives. The AI should assess each viewpoint, weigh pros and cons, and propose a balanced resolution to a hypothetical workplace conflict scenario.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, include at least three different stakeholder perspectives, and require the AI to output a structured resolution plan in bullet points.
example_prompt: In a project meeting, the marketing team believes the new campaign should focus on social media engagement, while the sales team insists on direct outreach. Meanwhile, the finance department is concerned about the budget for these approaches. Based on these perspectives, outline a resolution plan to unify the teams' strategies without exceeding the budget.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a bullet-pointed plan that synthesizes the perspectives of the marketing, sales, and finance teams, offering a cohesive strategy that addresses each department's concerns.

title: Summarize a Short Article
description: Your task is to summarize a short article provided in the context of a specific topic. The summary should capture the main ideas and key points without including any unnecessary details. Focus on clarity and conciseness in your summary.
constraints: The summary must be no longer than 50 words and should include at least one example of a key point from the article.
example_prompt: Summarize the following article about the benefits of staying hydrated. Example: 'Water intake can improve concentration levels.'
expected_outcome: A clear and concise summary of the article that highlights its main ideas in 50 words or less.

title: Basic Calculator Prompt Generation
description: Create a prompt that instructs the AI to generate a simple calculator program. The program should be able to perform basic arithmetic operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Ensure that the prompt asks for user input for two numbers and an operator, and provide clear instructions on displaying the output for the calculation result.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words and should include at least one example of user input and expected output.
example_prompt: Write a simple Python program that takes two numbers and an operator (+, -, *, /) as input from the user and returns the correct result based on the operation requested. For example, if the input is 5, 3, and +, the output should be 8.
expected_outcome: A fully functional Python calculator program that executes the requested arithmetic operation based on user input.

title: Sustainable Smart Packaging Design
description: Create a product design prompt for a new line of sustainable smart packaging solutions that utilize IoT technology for real-time tracking and consumer interaction. The design must prioritize user experience, sustainability, and integration with existing logistics systems while keeping costs minimal. Consider environmentally friendly materials and how the packaging can enhance product shelf-life and safety.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, should include at least three functional requirements, and suggest two types of interactions with consumers.
example_prompt: Design a sustainable smart packaging solution for a perishable food product that communicates freshness status via a mobile app, utilizes biodegradable materials, and includes a built-in QR code for interactive user engagement. The packaging should enhance safety features by detecting temperature fluctuations.
expected_outcome: The AI should deliver a comprehensive packaging design that integrates IoT functionalities, highlights sustainability, and offers unique user engagement strategies while addressing the outlined requirements.

title: Multi-Step Logical Deduction Challenge
description: Create a prompt that guides an AI to solve a complex multi-step logical reasoning problem involving real-world scenarios. The task should require the AI to deduce conclusions from a series of premises and provide justification for each step taken. The prompt should encourage the AI to articulate its reasoning process clearly and concisely.
constraints: Max 150 words, must include at least three premises and a clear question at the end, require explanations for each conclusion drawn.
example_prompt: Given the following premises: 1) All mammals are warm-blooded. 2) Some warm-blooded animals can fly. 3) Bats are mammals. Based on these premises, can it be concluded that some mammals can fly? Justify your reasoning step by step.
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a logical progression of thought, demonstrating how it derived the conclusion based on the premises, including any necessary clarifications or assumptions made during reasoning.

title: Design a Water Bottle with Unique Features
description: Create a design for a water bottle aimed at outdoor enthusiasts. Your design should include features that address common issues faced by hikers, such as hydration tracking, ease of attachment to backpacks, and insulation for temperature maintenance. Consider materials and ergonomics in your design.
constraints: The design must include at least three innovative features, a color scheme, and a brief justification for each feature. Max 150 words.
example_prompt: Design a water bottle for hikers that tracks hydration, attaches to backpacks, and maintains temperature. Describe the features and materials you would use.
expected_outcome: A conceptual design of a unique water bottle that highlights innovative features with a brief explanation of each, including proposed colors and materials.

title: Dynamic API Data Fetcher
description: Create a Python script that dynamically fetches and displays data from a public REST API based on user input. The program should allow users to specify the type of data they want to retrieve (e.g., weather, user profiles, etc.) and handle errors gracefully. Include functions for making API requests and parsing responses.
constraints: The code must be modular, with separate functions for fetching and parsing data. Include error handling for network issues and invalid user input. Maximum 150 lines of code.
example_prompt: Write a Python script that prompts the user for a data type (e.g., 'weather', 'users') and then fetches the relevant information from a public API. Handle possible errors and display user-friendly error messages.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python script that executes without errors, allows user input for data type, fetches data from the specified API, and displays it neatly or handles errors gracefully.

title: Adaptive Furniture Design for Small Spaces
description: Design a multifunctional piece of furniture that adapts to various living scenarios in small spaces. Your design should seamlessly transition between at least three distinct functions while maintaining aesthetic appeal and user comfort. Consider materials, durability, and ease of modification in your design.
constraints: Your design brief must be no more than 150 words and include sketches or concept images as visual support. Additionally, outline the target market and user personas it is aimed at.
example_prompt: Create a design proposal for a coffee table that can transform into a work desk and dining table, including dimensions, materials, and a user experience flow.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive design proposal complete with sketches, a clear transition flow between functions, material suggestions, and a user persona analysis.

title: Sustainable Packaging Redesign
description: Design a sustainable packaging solution for a new product that minimizes environmental impact while ensuring functionality and customer appeal. The design must incorporate biodegradable materials and consider the entire supply chain from production to disposal. Visual designs and a short write-up explaining the materials and choices are required.
constraints: Must utilize at least three eco-friendly materials, include a mockup of the design, and detail the environmental benefits compared to conventional packaging. Maximum 300 words.
example_prompt: Create a sustainable packaging design for a convenient meal kit that includes clear instructions, eco-friendly materials, and an innovative unpacking experience.
expected_outcome: A visually appealing packaging mockup accompanied by a write-up that explains the materials used, the design process, and the environmental benefits of this packaging compared to traditional options.

title: Conditional Logic Puzzle Prompt Creation
description: Create a prompt that requires the AI to use conditional logic to respond to scenarios involving multiple characters and their relationships. The prompt should present a situation where the characters' actions depend on each other's decisions, encouraging the AI to reason through the implications of each option.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 120 words, include at least three characters, and provide two or more conditional scenarios.
example_prompt: A detective is questioning three suspects: Alice, Bob, and Charlie. If Alice was at the scene, then Bob couldn't have been there. If Charlie was lying, then Bob was telling the truth. If Bob was lying, then Alice was definitely guilty. Deduce who is guilty based on the given conditions.
expected_outcome: The AI should analyze the relationships and conditions to deduce who is guilty, providing a clear explanation of its reasoning process and conclusions drawn.

title: Develop an AI-Powered Campaign Strategy
description: Create a comprehensive marketing campaign strategy using AI-generated insights and user behavior data. Your task is to formulate targeted messaging for different segments, outline channels for distribution, and suggest metrics for evaluating success, while integrating the latest trends in consumer behavior to enhance engagement.
constraints: Must include at least three user segments, two distribution channels, and three success metrics. Limit to 200 words.
example_prompt: Generate a marketing campaign strategy for a new eco-friendly product targeting millennials, baby boomers, and Gen Z. Include specific messaging for each segment, propose channels such as social media and email marketing, and identify metrics for gauging effectiveness.
expected_outcome: A detailed campaign strategy that includes tailored messaging for each segment, clearly defined channels to reach the target audience, and metrics to assess the campaign's performance, showcasing AI's role in enhancing marketing effectiveness.

title: Multi-Step Scenario Resolution
description: Design a prompt that requires the AI to evaluate a multi-layered scenario involving conflicting objectives from multiple stakeholders. The prompt should guide the AI to analyze the situation, weigh the trade-offs, and suggest a balanced solution that meets the needs of all parties involved.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, must explicitly state the stakeholders and their objectives, and should require at least three different reasoning steps.
example_prompt: You are a mediator in a city council dispute. The local business owners want to extend operating hours to boost sales, while residents want limited hours to reduce noise. Additionally, city regulations allow for extended hours but only if noise complaints are less than a specific threshold. Evaluate these conflicting objectives and propose a solution that addresses all parties.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive analysis of the situation, clearly outlining the trade-offs involved and providing a well-reasoned proposal that balances the interests of business owners, residents, and city regulations.

title: Multimodal Story Creator
description: Create a prompt that guides an AI to produce a short story integrating three different formats: narrative text, a dialogue script, and a poem. The story should revolve around a central theme of 'rediscovery' and creatively switch formats at defined intervals, enhancing the storytelling experience while maintaining coherence and emotional depth.
constraints: The entire prompt must not exceed 150 words, must specify the moment where each format switch occurs, and include at least two keywords: 'rediscovery' and 'connection'.
example_prompt: Write a short story about a character rediscovering an old passion. Begin with narrative text introducing the character and their environment, switch to dialogue when they meet an old friend who inspires them, and conclude with a poem that encapsulates their feelings of connection to their passion.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a cohesive short story that incorporates narrative prose, a dialogue segment, and a concluding poem, all thematically tied to rediscovery and connection.

title: Automated Customer Support Ticket Classification
description: Develop a prompt that enables an AI to automatically classify customer support tickets into predefined categories based on their content. The prompt should allow the AI to analyze ticket details, identify intent, and assign appropriate urgency levels, ensuring efficiency in processing requests. The challenge requires an understanding of natural language processing and the ability to create nuanced prompts that guide the AI appropriately.
constraints: Must use at least three different ticket examples, each varying in complexity. The total word count should not exceed 150 words, and the prompt must include specific categories for classification such as 'Technical Issue', 'Billing Inquiry', and 'General Question'.
example_prompt: "Classify the following customer support tickets into appropriate categories: 1) 'My app keeps crashing when I try to log in', 2) 'I have a question about my last bill', 3) 'Can you tell me how to update my profile information?' Assign also an urgency level: Low, Medium, High based on the ticket content."
expected_outcome: The AI should return classifications for each ticket, including the category and urgency level, effectively demonstrating its understanding of the text and ability to categorize accurately.

title: Targeted Sentiment Analysis for Ad Campaigns
description: Develop a prompt that directs an AI to analyze consumer sentiment from social media about a specific brand or product. The goal is to extract actionable insights that can refine the brand's marketing strategies and messaging. The challenge requires understanding how to interpret nuanced user comments and gauge overall sentiment accurately.
constraints: The prompt must request sentiment analysis of at least 1000 social media comments with specific examples and a summary of the sentiment trends found. No more than 150 words.
example_prompt: Analyze the following 1000 comments regarding Brand X's new product launch on Twitter. Identify overall sentiment, highlight recurring themes, and suggest three marketing strategies to address customer feedback.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed sentiment analysis report including quantifiable metrics (positive, negative, neutral percentages), key themes from the comments, and tailored marketing recommendations based on the findings.

title: Summarize Corporate Annual Report
description: Your task is to summarize a corporate annual report, capturing key financial metrics, strategic initiatives, and market outlook provided within it. The summary should be concise yet informative, ideal for stakeholders who need a quick understanding of the company's performance without delving into the full report.
constraints: The summary must be between 150-200 words, omit any jargon or technical terms, and should include at least three key highlights from the report.
example_prompt: Summarize the attached annual report of XYZ Corporation, focusing on their revenue growth, major strategic initiatives undertaken in the past year, and outlook for the next year.
expected_outcome: A clear and concise summary that outlines revenue growth figures, identifies strategic initiatives like new product launches or market expansions, and presents the company's outlook for upcoming fiscal periods.

title: Create a Multi-Channel Marketing Strategy Using AI Outputs
description: Design a comprehensive marketing strategy that utilizes AI-generated content across at least three different channels (e.g., social media, email, blog). Each channel should have unique engagement tactics, and the content must be tailored to the platform's audience while maintaining a consistent brand voice. Focus on driving engagement and conversion rates with measurable outcomes
constraints: The marketing strategy should be no more than 500 words. It must include at least one AI-generated content example for each channel, and a brief analysis of expected engagement metrics. Incorporate a clear call to action for each channel.
example_prompt: Craft a detailed marketing strategy for promoting a new eco-friendly product line on Instagram, email newsletters, and the company blog. Include AI-generated content examples and outline expected engagement metrics and calls to action for each channel.
expected_outcome: A robust multi-channel marketing strategy document encompassing specific AI-generated content for each channel, clear measurement metrics, and actionable insights leading to increased brand awareness and conversions.

title: Multi-Step Data Transformation Automation
description: Create a prompt that automates a multi-step data transformation process for a given CSV dataset. The solution should involve cleaning, transforming, and summarizing the data to produce actionable insights. Your prompt must guide the AI in handling different data types and implementing conditional logic based on the dataset's contents.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words, include at least three specific examples of required transformations, and address potential errors in data processing.
example_prompt: "Given the following CSV data, clean any missing values, convert all string fields to lowercase, summarize numeric fields using mean and median, and generate a report of the findings. Example transformations: 1) Replace all missing entries in the 'Age' column with the average age; 2) Convert 'Product' names to lowercase; 3) Summarize sales figures by region in a new DataFrame. Handle any non-numeric data gracefully by alerting if encountered."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-defined script or instructions for performing the specified data transformations on the provided CSV dataset, along with error handling mechanisms and a summary report format.

title: Multi-Faceted Problem Solving
description: Design a prompt that requires the AI to address a complex, multi-step problem involving logical reasoning and creative thinking. The task should involve analyzing a scenario where multiple outcomes are possible based on varying conditions and providing a detailed solution that outlines each step taken to reach the conclusion. The solution should highlight critical thinking and the justification for each decision made.
constraints: Prompt must be between 150-200 words, include at least two distinct scenarios with different outcomes, and require a structured response with explicit reasoning for each step taken.
example_prompt: Imagine a city needs to reduce traffic congestion. Present two different strategies: one focusing on public transport improvements and the other on road expansion. Analyze the potential impact of each strategy, considering economic, environmental, and social factors. Provide a detailed report evaluating both strategies' effectiveness in reducing congestion.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive analysis that discusses both strategies, weighing the pros and cons, and draw a logical conclusion on which strategy might be more effective under specific conditions, supported by data-driven reasoning.

title: Character Development Challenge
description: Create a compelling character for a short story. Your character should have a unique name, a distinct personality, and a backstory that explains their motivations. Consider what makes them relatable and interesting to readers.
constraints: Must include at least 3 personality traits, a backstory of 100 words or less, and a description of their primary goal.
example_prompt: Create a character named Alex who is a shy but ambitious artist. Include their personality traits, backstory, and what they hope to achieve in life.
expected_outcome: A detailed character description that includes the name, personality traits, a brief backstory, and their primary goal or dream.

title: String Manipulation Challenge
description: Write a function that takes a string as input and returns a new string where each word is capitalized. Additionally, the function should also remove any extraneous spaces between words. This task will help you practice basic string manipulation and understanding of functions.
constraints: The function must be named 'capitalize_words' and should handle edge cases like empty strings. The code should be no longer than 50 lines.
example_prompt: Create a function `capitalize_words(input_string)` that capitalizes each word in the input string and removes extra spaces. For example, if the input is '  hello  world   ', the output should be 'Hello World'.
expected_outcome: The function should correctly capitalize all the words in the input string and eliminate unnecessary spaces, returning the properly formatted string.

title: Sustainable Packaging Redesign
description: Design an innovative and sustainable packaging solution for a common consumer product (e.g., food, cosmetics, or electronics) that minimizes environmental impact while ensuring product safety and user convenience. Consider materials, manufacturing processes, and end-of-life recyclability in your design.
constraints: The design must utilize at least two biodegradable or recyclable materials, include a user-friendly unboxing experience, and be presented in a mockup format with dimensions (max 200 words).
example_prompt: Create a sustainable packaging design for a skincare product that uses biodegradable materials and is easy to open with one hand.
expected_outcome: A detailed design mockup with materials listed, dimensions provided, and an explanation of how the design meets sustainability and user convenience goals.

title: Design a Simple Eco-Friendly Water Bottle
description: Your task is to design a basic concept for an eco-friendly water bottle that targets environmentally conscious consumers. The design should emphasize sustainability, aesthetics, and functionality, all while being easy to use and transport. Consider materials, shapes, and features that make the bottle appealing and practical for everyday use.
constraints: The design description should be a maximum of 150 words and must include at least two unique features that differentiate it from traditional water bottles.
example_prompt: Create a description for an eco-friendly water bottle, highlighting its unique features and why they matter.
expected_outcome: A brief product description that outlines the water bottle's design, materials, and key features, along with a rationale for why these features are beneficial for the user and the environment.

title: Multifaceted Article Summarization
description: Create a concise summary of a complex article that covers multiple topics. The summary should capture the main ideas of each section while also conveying how they interrelate. This will test your ability to distill key information from a diverse set of content while maintaining clarity and coherence.
constraints: The summary must be between 150-200 words and include at least three key topics from the article. It should also explicitly mention the relationship between these topics to enhance understanding.
example_prompt: Given an article on climate change, renewable energy, and economic policies, summarize the article in 150-200 words, covering how these three topics connect and affect each other.
expected_outcome: A coherent summary that effectively presents the three key topics while explaining their interconnections in a clear and concise manner, within the specified word limit.

title: Simple Calculator Function
description: Create a simple calculator function in Python that can perform addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. The function should accept two numbers and an operator as input, and return the result of the operation. Ensure to handle division by zero gracefully with an appropriate message.
constraints: The function must be named 'simple_calculator', accept exactly three parameters (two numbers and one operator), and handle invalid operators by returning a descriptive error message.
example_prompt: Write a function named 'simple_calculator' that takes two numbers and an operator. For example, 'simple_calculator(10, 2, '+') should return 12, and 'simple_calculator(10, 0, '/') should return 'Error: Division by zero'.
expected_outcome: A Python function named 'simple_calculator' that can perform basic arithmetic operations and handles edge cases correctly.

title: Social Media Campaign Development
description: Create a marketing prompt that generates a comprehensive social media campaign plan for a new eco-friendly product. The campaign should include target audience analysis, key messaging, content types, and a posting schedule. Your goal is to help users understand how to structure their marketing efforts effectively.
constraints: Max 150 words; must include at least two audience segments and three content types.
example_prompt: Draft a detailed social media campaign plan for a new organic skincare line targeting health-conscious millennials and environmentally-conscious Gen Z. Include suggested platforms, types of posts (like videos, stories, or infographics), and a two-week posting schedule.
expected_outcome: A structured, detailed campaign plan highlighting audience segments, key messages, recommended content types, and a timeline for execution.

title: Corporate Email Summary
description: You are given a series of corporate emails discussing project updates, deadlines, and team feedback. Your task is to create a concise summary of the key points from these emails, capturing essential details such as action items, important dates, and stakeholder comments. The final summary should be coherent and easy to understand for someone who has not read the emails.
constraints: The summary must be no more than 150 words and must include at least three key action items derived from the emails.
example_prompt: Summarize the following emails from the project management team about the new product launch. Focus on deadlines, assigned tasks, and any team concerns raised.
expected_outcome: A well-structured summary that highlights the crucial elements of the emails, clearly presents the action items, and uses professional language suitable for a corporate setting.

title: Scenario-Based Decision Making
description: Create a prompt that presents a complex scenario requiring decision-making based on multiple factors. The prompt should ask the AI to evaluate the situation and choose the best course of action while justifying the decision with reasoning around possible outcomes. The challenge is to incorporate at least three different factors that can influence the decision making and consider their implications.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, should involve a situation with at least three variables, and requires the AI to provide a clear rationale for their decision.
example_prompt: You are the manager of a team facing a critical deadline for a project. You must decide whether to allow an extension, reallocate resources from another project, or push your team to meet the deadline. Consider the impact on team morale, project quality, and client relationships as you make your decision. Justify your choice based on these factors.
expected_outcome: The AI should analyze the scenario, discuss the implications of each choice, and provide a well-reasoned justification for the selected decision, demonstrating an understanding of the factors involved.

title: Create a Multi-Channel Marketing Strategy Prompt
description: Design a comprehensive prompt for AI to generate a multi-channel marketing strategy for a fictional eco-friendly product line. The strategy should integrate social media, email marketing, and influencer partnerships, taking into account target demographics and current market trends. Emphasize creativity and practical applicability.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words and include at least two specific examples of target demographics. It should explicitly ask for a timeline and key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure success.
example_prompt: Generate a multi-channel marketing strategy for a new line of biodegradable cleaning products targeting environmentally-conscious millennial homeowners. Include suggested social media platforms, email marketing tactics, and potential influencers. Specify a 6-month timeline and outline key performance indicators to measure effectiveness.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed marketing strategy that outlines specific channels, tactics, target demographics, a timeline, and measurable KPIs, demonstrating an understanding of multi-channel marketing principles and current trends in sustainability.

title: Weather-Based Activity Suggestion
description: Design a prompt that instructs the AI to suggest outdoor activities based on a given weather condition. The user should specify the type of weather (sunny, rainy, snowy) and the AI should generate three appropriate activities for that weather. This exercise will help in understanding how to use context in prompts effectively.
constraints: The prompt must be under 50 words and include at least one example of weather.
example_prompt: Given the weather condition 'sunny', suggest three outdoor activities.
expected_outcome: The AI lists three outdoor activities suitable for sunny weather, such as 'go for a hike,' 'have a picnic,' and 'swim in the pool.'

title: Automate Meeting Scheduling
description: Create a prompt that enables an AI to automatically schedule a meeting based on available time slots from two participants. The prompt should clearly define the required information such as participant names, their available times, and the meeting duration. This challenge is designed to help beginners understand how to provide clear instructions for automation tasks.
constraints: The prompt must be under 100 words and include minimum two example time slots for each participant.
example_prompt: Schedule a meeting between Alice and Bob. Alice is available on Tuesday from 2 PM to 4 PM and Wednesday from 1 PM to 3 PM. Bob is available on Tuesday from 3 PM to 5 PM and Wednesday from 1 PM to 4 PM. The meeting should last for 1 hour.
expected_outcome: The AI should output an optimal time for the meeting, indicating when it can take place based on the provided availability.

title: Crafting a Targeted Marketing Message
description: Compose a marketing message for a fictional eco-friendly water bottle brand targeting environmentally-conscious college students. The message should highlight unique selling points and appeal to their values. Think about what would resonate with this audience to encourage them to try the product.
constraints: The prompt must be concise, no more than 100 words, and should include at least 2 specific features of the product that would appeal to the target audience.
example_prompt: Write a marketing message for 'EcoSip,' an eco-friendly water bottle designed for college students. Highlight its features, such as sustainability and style.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a compelling marketing message that clearly communicates the unique features of the product while connecting with the target audience's environmental values and lifestyle.

title: Character Creation for a Short Story
description: Create a detailed character profile for a short story. Your character should have a unique name, age, occupation, and a brief backstory explaining their motivations. Consider how these traits might influence their decisions in a potential story scenario.
constraints: The character profile must be between 50-100 words and include at least one personality trait, one goal, and one challenge they face.
example_prompt: Create a character named 'Lila', a 28-year-old wildlife photographer. Describe her personality traits, her biggest dream, and a challenge she encounters while pursuing her career.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a character profile that meets the constraints and provides a clear, engaging outline for further storytelling.

title: Brevity in News Summarization
description: Your task is to summarize a given news article into a brief, coherent summary that captures the key points without losing essential context. The summary should be clear and concise, targeting a length of no more than 100 words, while ensuring it reflects the core message of the article adequately.
constraints: Maximum length of 100 words. The summary must highlight the main event, its significance, and include at least one quote from the article for authenticity.
example_prompt: Summarize the following news article in 100 words or less: [Insert news article text here]
expected_outcome: A focused summary of the article that includes the main event, its importance, and one quote, structured within 100 words.

title: Multi-Channel Campaign Strategy Development
description: Develop a comprehensive marketing campaign strategy that targets three different customer segments using at least five different channels (e.g., social media, email, content marketing). Each channel must include specific tactics and a unique message tailored for each segment to maximize engagement and conversion.
constraints: Must detail at least three customer segments, five marketing channels, and ten unique tactical suggestions. The response should be no more than 500 words.
example_prompt: Create a marketing strategy for a new eco-friendly product targeting young professionals, parents, and retirees through social media, email, content marketing, influencer partnerships, and online ads. Include specific messages and tactics for each channel.
expected_outcome: A detailed report outlining the campaign strategy with segment-specific messaging and tactical recommendations for each marketing channel, focusing on engagement and conversion strategies.

title: Simple Grocery List Automation
description: Create a prompt that automates the generation of a grocery shopping list based on a specified set of meal recipes. The user should input 3-5 meal names along with their ingredients, and the AI should list all unique ingredients required for these meals.
constraints: The prompt must be clear and no more than 100 words. It should include an example of 3 meal names and specify the output format for the grocery list.
example_prompt: Generate a grocery list for the following meals: Spaghetti Bolognese, Chicken Salad, and Tacos. List all the unique ingredients needed in bullet points.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive grocery list containing all unique ingredients from the specified meals, formatted in bullet points.

title: Daily Routine Reflection
description: Create a prompt that asks the user to reflect on their daily routine and identify one change they could make to improve their well-being. The prompt should encourage creative thinking and self-awareness by asking specific questions about their habits and feelings throughout the day.
constraints: Prompt must be 50-100 words and include at least three guiding questions.
example_prompt: Describe your daily routine and list any activities that make you feel stressed or tired. What is one small change you could implement to enhance your daily experience? How would this change affect your overall mood or productivity?
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a structured response that creatively suggests a change and reflects on its potential positive impact on the user's well-being.

title: Dynamic Query Generator with SQL Injection Prevention
description: Create a function that takes user-defined parameters for a database query and dynamically generates the SQL statement while preventing SQL injection attacks. The function should accept multiple filters and return results based on these parameters, ensuring security and efficiency in the query generation process.
constraints: The solution must implement prepared statements or ORM techniques and should support at least three different filtering criteria. Code must be clean, documented, and include example calls and outputs.
example_prompt: Given a database of books, generate a query to find books by a specific author and within a price range. Example inputs: author = 'J.K. Rowling', min_price = 10, max_price = 20.
expected_outcome: A secure SQL query that properly sanitizes inputs and returns a list of books matching the criteria without a risk of SQL injection.

title: Analyze and Reconstruct Arguments
description: Given a complex argumentative text, identify the main claim, the supporting evidence, and any logical fallacies present. Then, reconstruct the argument in a more cohesive and logical format, highlighting improvements. The task tests the ability to dissect reasoning and rewrite for clarity and effectiveness.
constraints: Max 500 words, must identify at least two logical fallacies and reconstruct the argument with improved clarity.
example_prompt: Analyze the following text for claims and fallacies: 'Many people believe that technology is ruining our social lives. However, studies show that technology facilitates communication, allowing us to connect with others more easily. Critics argue that face-to-face interactions are declining, but isn't that just a natural evolution of society?'
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a breakdown of the main claim and evidence, identify any logical fallacies (such as hasty generalization or false dichotomy), and present a rewritten version of the argument that is clearer and more logically sound.

title: Sustainable Packaging Redesign
description: Redesign the packaging for a consumer product to enhance its sustainability while maintaining aesthetic appeal and functionality. Consider materials, lifecycle, and waste reduction in your design. Provide visual mockups and rationale behind your choices.
constraints: Max 500 words describing the design concept, include at least two visual mockups, and ensure the design reduces environmental impact by 30%.
example_prompt: Redesign the packaging for a popular snack food to be more eco-friendly. Include visual mockups and explain how your design improves sustainability.
expected_outcome: A complete redesign proposal for a product’s packaging including sustainability metrics, associated visual mockups, and a clear explanation of how the redesign meets the specified constraints.

title: Dynamic World-building for Interactive Storytelling
description: Create a multi-layered prompt that generates a unique fantasy world, complete with geography, culture, and a compelling conflict. The prompt should be able to produce diverse outcomes based on user choices, making it suitable for interactive storytelling. Ensure that the world is rich in detail and encourages imaginative exploration.
constraints: Prompt must include at least three user-selectable options (e.g., type of conflict, cultural traits, geographical features) and be no longer than 150 words.
example_prompt: Generate a fantasy world where you choose a conflict (e.g., war between kingdoms, magical plague), specific cultural traits (e.g., nomadic tribes, advanced civilization), and geographical features (e.g., towering mountains, dense forests).
expected_outcome: An engaging, richly detailed fantasy world description that adapts based on the options chosen, providing layers of depth and inviting further exploration and interaction.

title: Narrative Architecture for Interactive Storytelling
description: Design a sophisticated prompt that enables an AI to generate a detailed narrative framework for an interactive story. The prompt should instruct the AI to create character arcs, multiple branching paths, and key plot points that allow for player choice, ensuring each branch possesses unique emotional stakes and consequences. Include a requirement for descriptive settings and character backgrounds.
constraints: Max 150 words; must outline at least three distinct character arcs and two plot branches per arc.
example_prompt: Create a detailed framework for an interactive fantasy story where the player can choose between three protagonists: a reluctant hero, a vengeful warrior, and a cunning rogue. Each character should have three distinct choices leading to different outcomes and experiences.
expected_outcome: An intricate narrative structure that lays out character backgrounds, emotional stakes, and at least two unique plot branches per character, complete with potential consequences of each choice.

title: Story Starter with a Twist
description: Create a prompt that starts a short story using a classic fairytale character but places them in an unexpected modern setting. For example, how would Little Red Riding Hood react if she found herself in a bustling city instead of a forest?
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 50 words and include a clear character and modern setting. It should inspire creative storytelling.
example_prompt: Write a story prompt that begins with 'Cinderella woke up in a dorm room on the first day of college...'
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a unique story that explores Cinderella's experiences and challenges in her new environment, incorporating elements of college life and her fairytale background.

title: Daily Routine Improvement
description: Create a prompt that asks the AI to help improve a typical daily routine. The prompt should encourage the AI to provide suggestions that enhance productivity while also considering personal wellbeing. Include areas such as morning activities, work hours, and evening relaxation.
constraints: Prompt must be clear, maximum 80 words, and include at least one example of a daily routine.
example_prompt: Can you suggest improvements to my daily routine? For example, I wake up at 7 AM, work from 9 AM to 5 PM, and unwind by watching TV.
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a revised daily routine with detailed suggestions for each part of the day, focusing on productivity and balance.

title: Create a Character Profile
description: Your task is to create a detailed character profile for a fictional character. Include their name, age, personality traits, and a brief backstory in a format that can be used for a story or role-playing game. This exercise helps you practice eliciting specific, structured information from the AI.
constraints: The profile must include at least four personality traits and a 2-3 sentence backstory. Keep the total character profile under 150 words.
example_prompt: Generate a character profile for a young wizard named Elara who is adventurous, curious, and a bit mischievous. Include her age and a short backstory.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a character profile that includes Elara's name, age, four distinct personality traits, and a concise backstory that fits the character's description.

title: Multi-Source Technical Summary Generation
description: Given a set of three distinct technical articles on a specific subject, your task is to create a cohesive summary that captures the core concepts and findings from each article. The summary should highlight the similarities and differences in the approaches taken by the authors, while also synthesizing any overarching themes that emerge across the articles.
constraints: Maximum length of the summary: 200 words. Must reference content from all three articles and include at least one citation per article along with the author's name and publication year.
example_prompt: Summarize the following articles on 'Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare': Article 1: 'AI for Diagnosis: Leveraging Data Science' by Smith (2023), Article 2: 'Ethical Implications of AI in Medicine' by Johnson (2022), Article 3: 'Future Prospects of AI-Driven Technologies' by Lee (2023).
expected_outcome: A well-structured 200-word summary that interlinks the main ideas from all three articles, supported by direct citations, highlighting how they collectively inform the current understanding of AI in healthcare.

title: Sustainable Packaging Design Challenge
description: Your task is to design a packaging solution for a new eco-friendly product targeting environmentally-conscious consumers. The packaging should minimize waste, utilize sustainable materials, and effectively protect the product while remaining visually appealing. Consider incorporating features that encourage recycling or reuse.
constraints: Your design must include at least two innovative features and be described in no more than 150 words. Include sketches or visual representations if possible.
example_prompt: Design an innovative packaging for a plant-based protein powder that uses biodegradable materials and includes a resealable feature to maintain freshness.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive design proposal that includes the packaging design, materials used, and a brief explanation of how the design promotes sustainability and usability for consumers.

title: Simple Email Automation
description: Create a prompt that helps automate the drafting of a basic email for a customer service response. The prompt should guide the AI to include the customer's name, issue, and a polite resolution. This will enable users to generate personalized responses quickly.
constraints: Max 100 words, must include placeholders for customer name, issue, and resolution
example_prompt: Draft a customer service email addressing {Customer_Name} regarding their {Issue} with the resolution: {Resolution}. Make it polite and professional.
expected_outcome: A well-structured email template that addresses the customer's issue, tailored with their name and the proposed solution, maintaining a courteous tone.

title: Implement a Custom Cache System
description: Design a custom caching mechanism in Python that can store, retrieve, and expire items based on a configurable time-to-live (TTL) setting. The cache should support concurrent reads and writes, ensuring thread safety. Include unit tests to validate the functionality under multiple scenarios.
constraints: The implementation must not use any external caching libraries. Provide a clear API for setting and getting cache items, as well as a method to clean expired items. Include at least three testing scenarios to demonstrate correctness and performance.
example_prompt: Create a Python class 'CustomCache' with methods 'set(key, value, ttl)' and 'get(key)'. Ensure that after 'ttl' seconds, the item is no longer retrievable. Include tests for concurrent access to the cache.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python class that implements the caching system, along with necessary methods and a test suite that checks item storage, retrieval, and expiration as well as concurrent usage.

title: Design a Minimalist Water Bottle
description: Create a design concept for a minimalist water bottle that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing. The design should promote sustainability by using eco-friendly materials and be easy to carry. Consider the user experience, including the ease of cleaning and the ability to hold different types of beverages.
constraints: The design must include sketches or diagrams, a brief description of the materials used, and a rationale for design choices, all within 300 words.
example_prompt: Sketch a minimalist water bottle that is lightweight, reusable, and made from sustainable materials. Describe the key features and user benefits in your submission.
expected_outcome: A visual design concept for a minimalist water bottle, accompanied by a written description detailing materials and usability features.

title: Describing a Day in the Life of a Cat
description: Your task is to create a prompt that guides an AI to write a short story about a day in the life of a household cat. The story should include at least three activities the cat engages in throughout the day, such as eating, sleeping, and playing. Make sure to convey the cat's perspective and feelings during these activities.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 100 words, include specific activities, and request a first-person narrative from the cat's perspective.
example_prompt: Write a short story from the perspective of a cat describing a day filled with napping, chasing mice, and interacting with its owner. Use at least three different activities and express the cat's feelings during each.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a coherent short story from the cat's perspective, detailing its activities and emotions throughout the day.

title: Targeted Advertisement Campaign Optimization
description: Design a prompt that optimizes an advertisement campaign for a specific target demographic based on their online behavior and preferences. Consider factors like the platform (social media, search engines, etc.), type of product, and specific marketing goals. The prompt should direct the AI to generate multiple tailored ad copies, including descriptions, calls-to-action, and visuals that resonate with the identified audience.
constraints: Max 150 words; must specify demographic details and marketing goals; include at least two distinct ad formats (e.g., text, video).
example_prompt: Generate three ad copies for a new eco-friendly skincare line targeting Gen Z women on Instagram, focusing on sustainability and inclusivity. Each ad should include a catchy headline, brief description, a call-to-action, and a suggested visual theme.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce three distinct ad copies that appeal to Gen Z women, emphasizing eco-friendliness and inclusiveness, with appropriate calls-to-action and visual themes for Instagram.

title: Character Development through Dialogue
description: Create a prompt that allows an AI to generate a short dialogue between two fictional characters, revealing their personalities, backgrounds, and motivations. The characters must have distinct traits and the dialogue should be authentic and engaging, providing insight into their relationship and conflict.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, must specify character traits for both characters, and must include a setting that influences the dialogue.
example_prompt: Write a dialogue between a skeptical detective and an enthusiastic rookie officer who are discussing a mysterious case in a dimly lit coffee shop. The detective is jaded and detail-oriented while the rookie is optimistic and idealistic.
expected_outcome: A coherent and imaginative dialogue that captures the essence of both characters, highlighting their differences and providing context for their conversation, while also showcasing their individual styles of speech.

title: Emotional Context Transfer
description: Create a prompt that takes a simple scene and infuses it with different emotional tones (e.g., happiness, sadness, tension). The goal is to rewrite the scene to evoke these different emotions while maintaining the underlying context. This will challenge the ability to manipulate language and emotional nuance.
constraints: Prompt must be no longer than 150 words, and should specify at least three different emotions to be layered onto the scene.
example_prompt: Imagine a character sitting alone on a park bench. Rewrite this scene to evoke feelings of joy, despair, and tension, maintaining the core action of 'sitting on a bench'.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce three distinct versions of the scene, each one successfully capturing the specified emotional tone while keeping the original action intact.

title: Multi-Document Synthesis Summary
description: Create a concise summary that captures key insights and themes from at least three different articles on climate change, focusing on their unique perspectives and solutions. The summary should synthesize the information while maintaining coherence and logical flow, demonstrating an understanding of the common threads among the articles.
constraints: The summary must be no more than 150 words and should accurately reflect the main arguments and conclusions of the articles without including direct quotations.
example_prompt: Summarize the following articles on climate change by synthesizing their arguments into a cohesive summary: Article 1 discusses renewable energy, Article 2 focuses on policy responses, and Article 3 highlights technological innovations.
expected_outcome: A well-structured summary that integrates insights from all three articles, providing a clear overview of the diverse approaches to addressing climate change.

title: Creating an Integrated Marketing Campaign
description: Design an integrated marketing campaign for a new sustainable fashion brand set to launch in a competitive market. Your campaign must include a detailed strategy for social media, email marketing, and influencer partnerships, while ensuring a cohesive brand message that highlights the sustainability aspect throughout all channels.
constraints: The campaign plan must be no more than 500 words and include at least three distinct marketing channels. Provide examples of potential content for each channel.
example_prompt: Draft an integrated marketing plan for 'EcoWear', a sustainable fashion line, detailing strategies for Instagram engagement, a monthly newsletter, and influencer collaborations, ensuring all elements convey the brand's eco-friendly ethos.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive integrated marketing campaign strategy that outlines specific tactics for each channel, showcases creative content ideas, and ensures brand consistency across platforms.

title: Eco-Friendly Smart Home Device Concept
description: Design an eco-friendly smart home device that reduces energy consumption while enhancing user comfort. Your design should integrate renewable energy sources and employ advanced materials to improve efficiency. Consider usability, market demand, and sustainability in your concept.
constraints: The proposal must be no more than 250 words, include at least three eco-friendly features, and outline potential user personas.
example_prompt: Create a concept for a smart thermostat that uses solar energy, provides real-time energy usage updates, and interacts with users via a mobile app to suggest energy-saving adjustments based on habits.
expected_outcome: A detailed product concept that includes innovative features, user personas, and a clear sustainability strategy, demonstrating potential market impact and usability.

title: Multithreaded Web Scraper with Rate Limiting
description: Develop a multithreaded web scraper that can extract specific data from multiple web pages simultaneously. The scraper must implement rate limiting to adhere to the target website’s usage policy, ensuring it does not exceed the maximum requests allowed per minute. Include error handling for connection issues and data parsing.
constraints: The scraper should be written in Python, utilize the `requests` and `BeautifulSoup` libraries, and support configuration of URL targets and data extraction rules through a JSON input file. Maximum 150 lines of code, including comments and documentation.
example_prompt: Write a Python script that scrapes product data from specified e-commerce pages, ensuring compliance with request limits. Output the scraped data in CSV format, with fields for product name, price, and URL.
expected_outcome: A functional Python script that successfully scrapes data, implements multithreading and rate limiting, and outputs the data in the specified format, along with appropriate error messages and handling.

title: Influencer Campaign Strategy Generation
description: Create a comprehensive influencer marketing campaign for a new eco-friendly product aimed at young adults. The campaign must include specific influencer personas, key messaging, content ideas, and platforms to be used. Consider budget constraints and engagement strategies to maximize impact.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words, include at least three influencer personas with detailed characteristics, and specify three distinct platforms. Include metrics for measuring success of the campaign.
example_prompt: Design a marketing campaign for an eco-friendly water bottle targeting environmentally conscious Millennials. Identify three influencer types (e.g., fitness, eco-conscious lifestyle, travel), outline the key messages for each type, and specify how you would engage them on two social media platforms. Include expected engagement metrics for evaluating the campaign's success.
expected_outcome: A detailed marketing campaign outline that includes influencer personas, content strategies, proposed platforms, and measurement metrics, showing a clear understanding of the target market's values and preferences.

title: Eco-Friendly Product Redesign
description: Redesign an existing everyday product to significantly enhance its sustainability without compromising functionality or user experience. Focus on innovative materials, manufacturing processes, or design elements that reduce environmental impact. Consider market trends and user behavior in your design solution.
constraints: Provide a detailed explanation of the design process, including at least three specific features and how they contribute to sustainability. The submission should not exceed 300 words and must include relevant market research data to support your design choices.
example_prompt: Redesign a standard plastic water bottle, focusing on sustainable materials and processes. Outline the new design features and their benefits to the environment.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive design proposal detailing the new product features, their sustainability impacts, and associated market research that demonstrates the practical benefits of the redesign.

title: Multi-Factor Decision Analysis
description: Create a prompt that instructs the AI to evaluate a decision based on multiple factors, such as cost, time, and effectiveness. The prompt should define a specific scenario, ask for a structured analysis of each factor, and require a final recommendation based on this analysis.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words, include at least three evaluation criteria, and ask for a ranked conclusion.
example_prompt: Analyze the decision of choosing between remote work and office work for a marketing team. Consider costs, productivity, and team collaboration in your evaluation. Provide a structured analysis for each factor and a final recommendation on which option is preferable, ranked based on your analysis.
expected_outcome: The AI should output a clear, structured evaluation of the two work options, detailing the analysis for each factor and concluding with a ranked recommendation, explaining the rationale behind the ranking.

title: Summarize a Technical Document
description: You are tasked with summarizing a technical document related to renewable energy solutions.
