Your summary should distill complex information into a concise paragraph, focusing on the key findings, methods, and implications presented in the document. Aim for a balance between clarity and brevity, capturing the essence of the content without oversimplifying it.
constraints: The summary must be no longer than 150 words and should maintain the original document's key terminology and concepts without introducing new jargon.
example_prompt: Summarize the following technical document about solar panel efficiency advancements in no more than 150 words, focusing on the main findings and their implications for future research.
expected_outcome: A coherent summary that accurately reflects the main points of the technical document, providing a clear understanding of the subject matter to a reader unfamiliar with the original content.

title: Extractive Summary of Scientific Papers
description: Develop a prompt that requires generating an extractive summary of a given scientific research paper, focusing on the main contributions, methodologies, and key findings. The challenge lies in creating a summary that is concise and captures the essence of the paper while maintaining a balance between detail and brevity.
constraints: The summary must be no more than 150 words and should include at least three distinct points: the research problem addressed, the methods employed, and the major findings. Include citations in APA format for any referenced materials.
example_prompt: You are given the following scientific paper: [insert paper text here]. Create an extractive summary highlighting the problem, methods, and findings in no more than 150 words.
expected_outcome: A coherent extractive summary that accurately reflects the crucial elements of the paper, staying within the specified word limit and maintaining the required citation format.

title: Social Media Post Generation
description: Create a prompt that will help generate engaging social media posts for a fictional brand called 'EcoSip', which sells eco-friendly water bottles. The prompt should encourage creativity while highlighting sustainability and the benefits of using their product.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 50 words and should include at least one example of a social media post.
example_prompt: Generate a vibrant social media post for EcoSip that showcases their eco-friendly water bottle and encourages followers to share their sustainable habits. Example: 'Stay hydrated, stay green! 🌍💧#EcoSip'
expected_outcome: The AI should produce multiple creative social media posts that emphasize environmental sustainability and encourage user engagement using hashtags and calls to action.

title: Multimodal Story Weaving
description: Create a comprehensive prompt that generates a short story combining visual imagery, character development, and an unexpected twist. The prompt should guide the AI to incorporate at least three distinct sensory elements and challenge the reader's perception of reality.
constraints: The prompt must be under 150 words, include at least two examples of sensory descriptions, and specify a genre (e.g., fantasy, mystery) for the story.
example_prompt: Write a short story set in a bustling fantasy marketplace, where the protagonist stumbles upon an enchanted artifact that alters reality. Include rich visual details, sounds of the crowd, and the warmth of sunlight filtering through canopies.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a coherent and engaging short story that effectively blends sensory details, develops the protagonist's character, and features a surprising plot twist related to the enchanted artifact.

title: Simple Calculator Prompt
description: Create a prompt that instructs an AI to generate a simple calculator program that can perform basic arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division). Include requirements for handling user input and output results to the console.
constraints: The prompt must be clear and concise, no longer than 100 words, and include examples of valid user input.
example_prompt: Write a Python program that functions as a simple calculator. It should prompt the user to enter two numbers and an operation (e.g., '+', '-', '*', '/') and output the result. For example, if the user inputs '5', '3', and '+', the program should output '8'.
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a functioning Python code that implements the described calculator functionality, including prompts for user input and displaying the result correctly.

title: Narrative Continuity Challenge
description: Design a series of prompts that will maintain narrative continuity over three distinct phases of a story. The prompts should guide the AI in crafting a coherent narrative that introduces characters, develops conflict, and resolves the story arc while ensuring each phase connects logically to the next. Incorporate varying tones and perspectives to enhance creativity.
constraints: The total word count for all three prompts must not exceed 150 words. Each prompt must specify a different narrative phase: introduction, development, and conclusion, and include at least one character and one conflict in each.
example_prompt: Phase 1: Introduce a weary traveler lost in a mystical forest who hears a whisper leading them deeper into danger. Phase 2: Describe the traveler discovering an ancient artifact that reveals their destiny but also awakens a guardian. Phase 3: Conclude with the traveler confronting the guardian to reclaim their future and the choices they must make.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a three-part narrative that seamlessly connects the introduction of the traveler, their conflict with the guardian, and eventually their resolution, all while adhering to the tone and structural elements specified in the prompts.

title: Multi-Faceted Ethical Dilemma Analysis
description: Construct a prompt that outlines a complex ethical dilemma involving multiple stakeholders with conflicting interests. The response should analyze the perspectives of each stakeholder, weighing potential outcomes based on moral principles and practical implications, ultimately leading to a reasoned recommendation.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words and should explicitly state the values at stake (e.g., privacy, security, fairness). Include a requirement for at least three stakeholders and their potential motivations.
example_prompt: Consider a situation where a tech company decides to implement a surveillance system in public spaces to enhance security. The stakeholders include: 1) City officials who prioritize safety, 2) citizens concerned about privacy, and 3) civil rights organizations advocating for surveillance limits. Analyze the ethical implications of this decision, identifying the values at play and proposing a balanced approach.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive analysis addressing each stakeholder's motivations, the ethical principles involved, potential consequences, and a thoughtful recommendation that seeks a balance between safety and privacy.

title: Multi-Source Summarization Challenge
description: In this task, you will be required to summarize a collection of at least three diverse articles on a single topic, synthesizing information across multiple viewpoints and types of content such as reports, opinion pieces, and studies. The goal is to produce a cohesive and comprehensive summary that captures the essence of the subject matter while noting points of divergence and consensus among the sources.
constraints: Your summary must not exceed 200 words, should include key statistics and quotes from the sources, and must provide an analysis of differing perspectives on the topic.
example_prompt: Summarize the main findings from the following articles on climate change: "The Impact of Climate Change on Global Agriculture", "Climate Change: A Call to Action", and "Navigating the Uncertainties of Climate Policy". Ensure that your summary includes diversity of thought and highlights key statistics while maintaining coherence.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a concise 200-word summary that effectively integrates information from the three articles, presents contrasting views, and highlights the major trends or statistics relevant to the climate change topic.

title: Create an Engaging Social Media Post
description: Your task is to create a social media post for a new coffee shop opening in your town. The post should be engaging and invite people to visit the shop for a special opening day promotion. Think about how to highlight the unique aspects of the coffee shop while making it sound appealing to a broad audience.
constraints: The post should be no longer than 50 words and include at least one call-to-action (e.g., visit us, join us).
example_prompt: Write a short social media post announcing the opening of 'Brewed Awakenings', a cozy new coffee shop, offering a buy-one-get-one-free promotion on opening day.
expected_outcome: An engaging social media post that clearly states the promotion and encourages potential customers to visit the coffee shop.

title: Customer Segmentation Analysis
description: Develop a marketing strategy by segmenting a target audience for a new product launch. Utilize demographic, psychographic, and behavioral criteria to define at least three distinct customer segments. Provide actionable marketing tactics tailored to each segment to maximize engagement and conversion rates.
constraints: Must include at least three customer segments with specific attributes, and suggest three marketing tactics for each segment. Maximum 250 words.
example_prompt: Segment the target audience for a new eco-friendly water bottle. Consider demographics, lifestyle, and purchase behavior.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive breakdown of three distinct customer segments (e.g., eco-conscious millennials, fitness enthusiasts, and busy professionals) along with tailored marketing strategies for each one.

title: Automated Workflow Optimization through AI Prompt Engineering
description: Design a comprehensive AI prompt that enables the automation of a multi-step business workflow involving task prioritization, resource allocation, and deadline management. The prompt should effectively generate a complete workflow plan based on minimal initial input data. The challenge is to ensure that the AI not only understands the context but also applies logical decision-making to optimize the tasks at hand.
constraints: Prompt must be under 150 words, include at least three examples of expected workflows, and focus on decision logic incorporated into the output.
example_prompt: Given the tasks: 'Prepare report', 'Attend meeting', and 'Send follow-up emails', with deadlines 'Monday', 'Tuesday', and 'Wednesday', create an optimized workflow plan detailing task priorities and resource allocations.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a structured workflow plan that prioritizes tasks based on urgency, allocates available resources efficiently, and suggests deadlines while accounting for potential overlaps and conflicts.

title: Create an Interactive Story Prompt
description: Design a prompt that generates an interactive story where the user can make choices for the protagonist at key points. The prompt should establish an engaging setting, introduce a conflict, and offer at least three decision points that influence the story's outcome. This will require careful structuring to maintain narrative coherence and user engagement throughout the story.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words, include at least three distinct branching choices, and provide a brief outline of potential story arcs based on user decisions.
example_prompt: Write a prompt that starts with 'In a futuristic city plagued by crime, you are a detective on a quest to uncover the truth behind a series of mysterious disappearances. You receive a tip-off that might lead to a breakthrough. Do you: A) Investigate the tip, B) Go back to gather more evidence, or C) Follow a suspicious character in the shadows?
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a coherent, interactive story that changes based on the user's choices, with an introduction, conflict, and multiple branching paths that lead to different conclusions.

title: Interval Merging Algorithm
description: Create a function that takes a list of intervals and merges all overlapping intervals into a single interval. The function should return a new list of intervals in sorted order. Consider edge cases such as intervals that touch but do not overlap, or intervals that are completely nested within each other.
constraints: The function should handle a maximum of 10,000 intervals and must maintain O(n log n) complexity. Include at least two test cases in your submission.
example_prompt: Write a function called 'merge_intervals' that takes a list of tuples (start, end) where intervals are represented by pairs of integers (start, end).
expected_outcome: An array of merged intervals, for example: input [(1, 3), (2, 6), (8, 10), (15, 18)] should output [(1, 6), (8, 10), (15, 18)].

title: Email Response Automation
description: Create a prompt that helps automate responses to common customer inquiries via email. The responses should be polite, clear, and relevant to the frequently asked questions, such as shipping times or return policies. Your task is to structure the prompt so it captures the essence of the inquiry and provides an appropriate response.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 100 words and should include at least two example questions and their corresponding automated responses.
example_prompt: 'Generate an email response for a customer asking about shipping times: 'What are your shipping times?' and 'How do I return an item?' Include suitable responses for both questions.'
expected_outcome: The AI should generate polite and informative email responses addressing the shipping and return inquiries effectively.

title: Automated Email Response Generator
description: Create a prompt for an AI that generates context-specific email responses based on the initial email content provided. The prompt should guide the AI to analyze the tone and intent of the email and produce a suitable reply that maintains professionalism and clarity.
constraints: Prompt must be under 150 words, include at least two example emails to demonstrate various tones (formal, informal), and ensure the AI response is concise with a maximum of 100 words.
example_prompt: "Analyze the following email: 'Hi team, can we discuss the project deadline? I think we might need more time to avoid rushing our work.' Generate a respectful and concise response acknowledging the request while suggesting a follow-up meeting to discuss further details."
expected_outcome: An AI-generated response that addresses the email's request, recognizes the concern about the deadline, and proposes a meeting to discuss it further, all while keeping the tone appropriate.

title: Multimodal AI Storytelling Challenge
description: Create a narrative-driven prompt that guides an AI to generate a multi-layered story incorporating themes of adventure and friendship. The prompt should include character descriptions, a setting, and a conflict to be resolved through the storyline. The challenge is to ensure the AI delivers a cohesive, engaging story that balances all elements effectively.
constraints: The prompt must be no longer than 150 words and include at least three character archetypes, a detailed setting description, and a central conflict.
example_prompt: Write a story about a brave young explorer named Sam, a wise old sage named Elara, and a mischievous creature named Pippin. They embark on a journey through a magical forest to find a lost treasure, while facing challenges that test their friendship and courage.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-structured story that features the specified characters, setting, and conflict, creating an engaging narrative arc with a resolution.

title: Dynamic API-based Data Aggregator
description: Develop an API-based data aggregation system that fetches and consolidates real-time data from at least three different public APIs. The system must handle various data types and formats, ensuring consistency and providing endpoints for retrieving aggregated data in a standardized format. Include error handling for API failures and rate limiting considerations.
constraints: The solution must be delivered in Python, include comprehensive unit tests, and documentation of the API endpoints (max 1000 words).
example_prompt: Create a Python function that fetches weather data from OpenWeatherMap, cryptocurrency prices from CoinGecko, and COVID-19 statistics from a public health API, aggregating these into a single JSON response.
expected_outcome: A fully functional Python program with defined API endpoints, clear documentation, and meaningful test cases covering possible edge cases.

title: Data Transformation Pipeline
description: Create a Python function that takes a list of dictionaries (representing user profiles) and transforms them into a specific format. Each profile should include first name, last name, and age. The output should be a list of formatted strings, e.g., 'John Doe, Age: 30'. The function should also handle missing fields gracefully.
constraints: Function must accept a list of at least 5 user profiles, must handle potential missing keys, output must be a list of strings, max 200 words.
example_prompt: Transform this list: [{'first_name': 'John', 'last_name': 'Doe', 'age': 30}, {'first_name': 'Jane', 'age': 25}, {'first_name': 'Alice', 'last_name': 'Smith'}]. Expected output: ['John Doe, Age: 30', 'Jane, Age: 25', 'Alice, Age: N/A'].
expected_outcome: A list of formatted strings based on provided user profiles, properly handling missing first name, last name, or age fields.

title: Dynamic Prompt Generator for Automated Reporting
description: Create an automation system that can generate customizable reports based on varying datasets and user inputs. The system should allow users to specify parameters such as date ranges, data types, and report formats, and then automatically create a detailed report using AI insights that incorporate visual data representations such as charts or graphs.
constraints: The prompt must not exceed 150 words, include at least three specific user input examples, and require advanced natural language processing capabilities to interpret and format the responses.
example_prompt: Generate a report summarizing sales data for the last quarter, including comparisons with the previous quarter and visual charts displaying sales trends. The user specifies a date range from January 1, 2023 to March 31, 2023, with a focus on product categories 'Electronics' and 'Home Appliances'.
expected_outcome: An AI-generated report containing a textual summary, comparative analysis, and visualizations (charts/graphs) that meet the specified parameters and are tailored to user insights.

title: Multi-Article Summarization Challenge
description: In this challenge, you are required to create a summary that synthesizes information from three distinct articles on climate change, identifying common themes, contrasting viewpoints, and emerging trends. The summary should reflect a comprehensive understanding of the materials while maintaining coherence and logical flow.
constraints: The summary must be a maximum of 250 words, integrate key points from all three articles, and highlight at least two contrasting perspectives on the subject.
example_prompt: Summarize the following three articles on climate change, ensuring to capture the main ideas and differences in opinions: 1. Article A discusses the effects of climate change on polar bears. 2. Article B presents economic implications of climate policy. 3. Article C explores technological solutions to climate challenges.
expected_outcome: A cohesive summary that encapsulates the main arguments from all three articles, clearly delineates differing viewpoints, and provides insights into the overarching narrative of climate change.

title: Multi-Language Code Translator
description: Create a program that can take code snippets in one programming language (Python, Java, or JavaScript) and translate them into another specified language. The challenge requires handling variable naming conventions, syntax differences, and ensuring that the translated code maintains the same functionality as the original. The program should also include error handling for unsupported code constructs.
constraints: The translator must support at least two languages and handle basic constructs such as loops, conditionals, and functions. The prompt should not exceed 150 words and include at least one code example for each supported language.
example_prompt: Translate the following Python code snippet into Java: 'def add(a, b): return a + b'.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Java equivalent of the provided Python function, maintaining the original functionality and handling variable naming and syntax appropriately.

title: Multi-Language Code Translator
description: Create a program that takes a code snippet written in one programming language and translates it into another programming language of your choice. The program must correctly interpret language-specific syntax and semantic rules, providing accurate translations while maintaining the original code functionality.
constraints: The program must support at least two different programming languages. Input code snippet should not exceed 50 lines. Include comments explaining each step of the transformation process.
example_prompt:
Translate the following Python code to Java:

```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

result = add(5, 10)
print(result)
```
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Java code equivalent to the provided Python snippet that functions identically and includes comments that explain the translation process.

title: Persona-Driven Campaign Design
description: Create a marketing campaign for a high-end coffee brand targeting a specific persona: a 30-45 year old urban professional who values sustainability and premium quality. The campaign should include a detailed content strategy, social media engagement plan, and a proposed budget allocation, highlighting how each part addresses the persona's pain points and desires.
constraints: Must include at least three different marketing channels, a sample social media post, and a budget breakdown. Maximum 500 words.
example_prompt: Design a campaign for "EcoBrews" aimed at eco-conscious urban professionals. Include content themes, channel strategies, and budget recommendations.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive marketing campaign proposal that outlines the strategy, execution plan, and how the campaign aligns with the target persona's lifestyle, including a creative social media post example.

title: Craft a Compelling Social Media Ad
description: Create a short and engaging social media advertisement for a fictional product of your choice. Highlight the product's unique features and benefits in a way that will attract potential customers. Use a tone that fits the target audience you choose for the product.
constraints: The ad must be no longer than 50 words and should include a catchy call to action. You must specify the product and target audience in your prompt.
example_prompt: Write a 50-word social media ad for a new eco-friendly water bottle targeting young professionals, including a call to action.
expected_outcome: A 50-word advertisement that clearly describes the product, its benefits, and effectively targets young professionals with a strong call to action.

title: Summarize a Short Article
description: Your task is to read a short article provided to you and write a concise summary. The summary should capture the main ideas and key points without including personal opinions or irrelevant details. Aim for clarity and brevity in your writing.
constraints: The summary must be no longer than 100 words and should restate the main points in your own words.
example_prompt: Please summarize the following article about the benefits of daily exercise in no more than 100 words.
expected_outcome: A clear, concise summary of the article that includes the main ideas and key points, adhering to the 100-word limit.

title: Multi-Document Summarization with Temporal Context
description: Create a comprehensive summary from a set of at least three related documents that span various time periods, ensuring the summary captures not only the main themes and insights but also the evolution of ideas over time. The challenge is to maintain coherence and temporal context while integrating facts from all sources.
constraints: The summary must not exceed 250 words, should highlight the chronological development of key concepts, and must reference specific events or changes from each document.
example_prompt: You are given three documents discussing the climate change policies from 2000, 2010, and 2020. Summarize their key points and discuss how the approaches have changed over time.
expected_outcome: An integrated summary that clearly outlines the main ideas of climate change policies from each document, linking them together to reflect the progression and shifts in strategy over the two decades.

title: Simple Text Summarization Challenge
description: In this challenge, you will create a summarization prompt that takes a short article or paragraph and produces a concise summary. The goal is to capture the main idea and key points of the text in your summary while ensuring clarity and brevity.
constraints: The input text must be under 200 words. The summary should effectively communicate the main idea in no more than 50 words.
example_prompt: "Given the following text, please summarize it in one or two sentences: [Insert your text here]"
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a clear and coherent summary that reflects the essence of the input text without adding unnecessary details.

title: Custom Code Interpreter
description: Create a code interpreter that can execute a simplified programming language defined by user input. The interpreter should allow for basic arithmetic operations, variable assignment, and function definitions. Additionally, it must handle syntax errors gracefully and provide meaningful error messages back to the user.
constraints: The interpreter must be implemented in Python with a maximum of 200 lines of code. It must include at least three different arithmetic operations, allow variables, and support user-defined functions. Include at least two examples of code snippets that the interpreter can handle.
example_prompt: Create a simple interpreter for the following language: 'let x = 10; let y = 20; func add(a, b) { return a + b; } add(x, y);'. How would you implement it?
expected_outcome: A functioning Python script that implements the interpreter with error handling, including examples of code execution and proper error reporting.

title: Craft an Engaging Social Media Post
description: Your task is to create an engaging social media post for a new eco-friendly product. The post should highlight the product's key benefits and appeal to environmentally conscious consumers. Keep in mind the importance of using a relaxed and inviting tone to connect with the audience.
constraints: The post must be no more than 150 words and include a call-to-action. Use at least 2 emojis to enhance engagement.
example_prompt: Create a social media post promoting a new biodegradable phone case that is sustainable and stylish. Emphasize its environmental benefits and encourage followers to make a purchase.
expected_outcome: A creative social media post that effectively promotes the product, includes a clear call-to-action, and uses emojis to enhance appeal.

title: Social Media Campaign Prompt Design
description: Create a marketing prompt aimed at generating engaging content ideas for a specific product's social media campaign. Your prompt should encourage the generation of at least five creative post ideas that highlight the product’s features and appeal to the target audience. Remember, the goal is to spark creativity while providing enough context for relevance.
constraints: Max 100 words; must specify the product and target audience.
example_prompt: Generate five creative social media post ideas for promoting an eco-friendly water bottle aimed at environmentally-conscious college students.
expected_outcome: A list of five engaging and creative post ideas that effectively highlight the eco-friendly features of the water bottle and resonate with college students.

title: Automate Daily Task Reminders
description: Create a prompt that generates a daily task reminder for users based on their input. The user should specify their tasks for the day and the preferred time for reminders. Your goal is to develop a prompt that clearly requests this information and structures the reminders in a helpful way.
constraints: The prompt must request a list of tasks (max 5) and a specific time (using 24-hour format) for reminders. Ensure it is clear and concise (max 100 words).
example_prompt: Please list your tasks for today (up to 5) and specify a time (HH:MM) for your reminder. For example: '1. Buy groceries, 2. Attend meeting, time: 14:00.'
expected_outcome: The AI should output a structured reminder list formatted as 'Reminder: [Task] at [Time]', e.g., 'Reminder: Buy groceries at 14:00'.

title: Sustainable Packaging Innovation
description: Design a sustainable packaging solution for a new eco-friendly product. Your packaging should minimize waste, be made from renewable materials, and offer innovative ways to enhance user experience while being functional. Consider the entire lifecycle of the packaging, including production, usage, and disposal.
constraints: The design must include at least two sustainable materials, user interaction features, and an illustration. The description should be no more than 150 words and detail the environmental impact and usability benefits.
example_prompt: Create a sustainable packaging design for a reusable water bottle that incorporates renewable materials and enhances the user experience while being easy to recycle.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive design proposal that includes a description of the packaging, an illustrated concept, and a breakdown of its sustainability features and user benefits.

title: Summarize a News Article Successfully
description: Your task is to summarize a recent news article of your choice. The summary should capture the main points while keeping it concise and under 100 words. Focus on the who, what, when, where, and why to ensure all essential information is distilled into the summary.
constraints: The summary must be under 100 words and should cover all essential aspects of the news article (who, what, when, where, why).
example_prompt: Summarize the following article: [Insert News Article Link or Text Here]
expected_outcome: A clear, concise summary that highlights the main points of the news article with no more than 100 words.

title: Summarizing Daily News Articles
description: In this challenge, you will summarize a recent daily news article in your own words. The summary should capture the main points of the article while omitting unnecessary details, providing a clear understanding of the news event. Your summary should be concise and accurate, ideally capturing the essence of the article in a straightforward manner.
constraints: The summary must be between 50 to 100 words and must include the main idea and at least two key supporting details from the original article.
example_prompt: Summarize the following article: 'Today, a major breakthrough in renewable energy was announced, showing a way to harness solar power more efficiently. Scientists unveiled a new technology that can increase energy capture by 30%, making solar panels more viable for widespread use. This development is expected to accelerate the transition to cleaner energy.'
expected_outcome: A summary that reads something like: 'A new solar energy technology was announced that increases energy capture by 30%, which could hasten the shift towards renewable energy sources.'

title: Multi-layered Narrative Construction
description: Create a prompt that generates a multi-layered narrative intertwining three distinct genres (such as fantasy, thriller, and historical fiction) while maintaining a consistent tone and character arc. The narrative should be set in a fictional universe that adheres to internal logical rules and incorporate elements such as symbolism or recurring motifs.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words and include specific character traits, setting details, and a central conflict that transcends the genres.
example_prompt: Generate a story featuring a time-traveling detective who must solve a mystery involving a dragon in a war-torn medieval city, while reflecting on their own troubled past as a former royal guard.
expected_outcome: An engaging, cohesive narrative that elegantly balances elements from the three specified genres, showcases nuanced character development, and utilizes symbolic motifs effectively.

title: Develop a Multi-Channel Marketing Campaign Prompt
description: Design a series of prompts that each target a different digital marketing channel (e.g., social media, email, SEO) aimed at promoting a new product launch. Each prompt should specify target audience segments, unique value propositions, and key performance indicators to measure effectiveness across channels.
constraints: Each prompt must be under 150 words and include at least one persona, one key message, and one call-to-action. Prompts must cover at least three different channels and suggest tailored content strategies for each.
example_prompt: Create a social media post prompt for a new eco-friendly cleaning product targeting environmentally conscious young parents, focusing on the product's safety and sustainability features. Include a specific hashtag for engagement.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive set of prompts that elaborate on the unique strategies tailored to each channel, complete with suggested content types and measurement criteria for campaign success.

title: Create a Comprehensive Multi-Channel Marketing Campaign
description: Design a detailed marketing campaign that effectively uses at least three different channels (e.g., social media, email, and website). The campaign should target a specific audience segment and include strategic messaging, key performance indicators, and a timeline for execution. Provide rationale for channel selection and how they complement each other.
constraints: The campaign plan must be between 300-500 words and include examples of messaging for each channel.
example_prompt: Develop a multi-channel marketing campaign for a new sustainable product aimed at environmentally conscious consumers, incorporating social media, email newsletters, and blog content.
expected_outcome: A structured marketing campaign plan outlining the use of three channels, targeted messaging, KPIs for measuring success, and a coherent timeline for rollout and evaluation.

title: Dynamic Code Refactoring Tool
description: Develop an AI-driven tool that refactors given code snippets based on specified coding standards (e.g., clean code principles, performance optimizations). The tool should handle various programming languages and intelligently suggest improvements while preserving functionality. It should also explain the reasons behind each suggested change.
constraints: Max 200 words for code comments, must support at least 3 programming languages, must include unit tests to validate refactoring results.
example_prompt: Refactor the following JavaScript function to adhere to clean coding principles and optimize performance: 'function example(data){ for(let i=0;i<data.length;i++){ console.log(data[i]); }}'. Please provide explanations for each change.
expected_outcome: The AI should output a refactored version of the provided code, along with a detailed explanation of each modification, and accompanying unit tests to verify that the refactored function behaves identically to the original.

title: Multi-Channel Content Strategy Development
description: Create a comprehensive content strategy for an upcoming product launch targeting millennials across three different platforms: Instagram, TikTok, and email. Your strategy should include specific themes for each platform, types of content (e.g., videos, infographics, carousel posts), and engagement tactics to enhance visibility and interaction. Demonstrate an understanding of each platform's unique audience behaviors and preferences.
constraints: The strategy must be no more than 500 words and should include at least one example for each platform. Consider the use of influencers or partnerships as part of the engagement tactics.
example_prompt: Develop a marketing content strategy for our new eco-friendly skincare line launching next quarter. Focus on Instagram, TikTok, and email with specific themes and examples for each platform.
expected_outcome: A detailed content strategy document outlining themes, content types, and engagement tactics for Instagram, TikTok, and email that effectively resonates with millennial audiences.

title: Simple Article Summarization
description: Your task is to summarize a short article about climate change. Read the article and identify the main points and arguments made by the author. Construct a concise summary that captures the essence of the article without losing its meaning.
constraints: The summary must be no longer than 100 words and should include the main argument and at least two key points from the article.
example_prompt: Summarize the following article in no more than 100 words: 'Climate change is an urgent issue that impacts ecosystems and human health. Scientists report increasing temperatures and extreme weather conditions as important indicators of this crisis. It is essential for governments to take prompt action to mitigate its effects.'
expected_outcome: A concise summary of the article that includes the main argument about climate change and at least two key points discussed, all within the 100-word limit.

title: Identifying Key Details in a Text
description: In this challenge, you will read a short paragraph and identify the main idea and two supporting details. This task requires careful reading and comprehension skills, making it suitable for beginner prompt engineering.
constraints: The paragraph must be no longer than 100 words and should include clear details that make the main idea easily identifiable. Provide examples of main ideas and details.
example_prompt: Read the following paragraph: 'Usain Bolt is known as the fastest man in the world. He won three gold medals in the 2008 Olympic Games and set world records in the 100m and 200m sprints.' What is the main idea and two supporting details?
expected_outcome: The AI should respond with 'Main idea: Usain Bolt is the fastest man in the world. Supporting details: 1) He won three gold medals in the 2008 Olympic Games. 2) He set world records in the 100m and 200m sprints.'

title: Character Trait Identification
description: Create a prompt that asks the AI to identify and describe the main character traits of a fictional character based on a short excerpt from a story. Ensure the prompt encourages detailed reasoning about the character's actions and motivations.
constraints: The prompt must be under 150 words and include specific examples of characters from well-known literature or movies.
example_prompt: Given the following excerpt from a story, identify the main character's traits: 'Despite being scared, she stepped up to face the challenge, determined to conquer her fears.' Characters to consider: Harry Potter, Katniss Everdeen, or Sherlock Holmes.
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a list of at least three character traits along with explanations of how these traits are demonstrated through the given excerpt.

title: Dynamic Task Manager
description: Create a dynamic task management application that allows users to add, edit, and delete tasks. The application must also categorize tasks based on priority (high, medium, low) and allow sorting or filtering based on the selected category.
constraints: The application must be functional in a web environment, using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Include at least one example task and ensure the UI is user-friendly. Code should be well-commented and structured.
example_prompt: Build a simple task manager where users can add tasks with a title, description, and priority level. Allow them to mark tasks as complete and filter tasks by priority.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a working web application with accompanying HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code, complete with a user interface that can add, edit, delete, and categorize tasks.

title: Metaphorical Worldbuilding Challenge
description: Create a prompt that guides the AI to generate a complex narrative world by using unique metaphors for its elements, such as nature, society, and technology. The goal is to craft a multi-layered setting with rich descriptions that evoke emotions and provoke thought, while ensuring that each metaphor contributes to the overall imagery in a cohesive manner.
constraints: Max 150 words, must include at least three distinct metaphors, and specify the type of narrative (e.g., fantasy, sci-fi).
example_prompt: Construct a world where forests are viewed as living archives of memory, rivers represent the flow of time, and cities pulse like the heartbeat of sentient beings. Describe the societal implications of these metaphors on the inhabitants' culture and daily lives.
expected_outcome: A detailed world description that intricately weaves together the provided metaphors, illustrating their significance and how they shape the narrative's context and inhabitants.

title: Argumentative Analysis and Counterobjective Generation
description: Craft a prompt that requires the AI to analyze a provided argument critically and generate a counterargument based on opposing viewpoints. The AI should also provide justification for the counterargument, demonstrating logical reasoning and an understanding of fallacies. The prompt should encourage depth and thoroughness in evaluation, pushing the AI to consider various perspectives.
constraints: Must include at least one argument for analysis, a maximum of 150 words, and require the generation of at least two distinct counterarguments with justifications.
example_prompt: Analyze the following argument: "Artificial intelligence will eventually replace human jobs completely, leading to increased unemployment and economic instability." In your response, provide two counterarguments, including a discussion of potential benefits of AI and scenarios where new jobs might be created as a result of AI advancements. Justify each counterargument with logical reasoning.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed analysis of the provided argument, generate two valid counterarguments, and justify them thoroughly, highlighting the complexity of the issue.

title: Multifaceted Problem Decomposition
description: Design a prompt that requires the AI to decompose a complex, real-world problem into its fundamental components and reason through potential solutions. The problem should involve at least three variables and require the AI to evaluate the implications of each variable's influence on the overall scenario.
constraints: The prompt must be a minimum of 150 words, include a clear description of the complex problem, and specify at least three variables that the AI must consider in its reasoning.
example_prompt: "A city is facing severe traffic congestion. Identify at least three contributing factors, such as population density, public transport availability, and urban planning choices. Decompose these factors and reason out how altering each one could reduce congestion. Provide specific examples of potential solutions based on your analysis."
expected_outcome: The AI should provide a structured analysis of the problem, identifying each variable and discussing how changes to each could lead to different outcomes, ultimately suggesting practical solutions.

title: Automate Daily Task Reminders
description: Create a prompt that generates a daily task reminder list for a fictional character named Alex. The reminders should include tasks such as 'Buy groceries', 'Walk the dog', and 'Finish the report'. The prompt should guide the AI to produce a clear, organized list of reminders in bullet points.
constraints: Prompt must include at least three tasks, formatting should be in bullet points, max 100 words.
example_prompt: Generate a daily task reminder list for Alex that includes the following tasks: 'Buy groceries', 'Walk the dog', and 'Finish the report'.
expected_outcome: A neatly formatted bullet point list of reminders for Alex, including the specified tasks and any additional relevant tasks.

title: Text-Based Adventure Game Engine
description: Develop a simple text-based adventure game engine that allows users to create their own interactive stories. The engine should support commands like 'go', 'take', and 'look', allowing users to navigate through rooms, pick up items, and examine them. Include basic error handling for invalid commands and a way to save the game state.
constraints: The game should consist of at least 3 rooms, support a minimum of 2 items, and include a simple command parser. Total code should not exceed 300 lines.
example_prompt: Create a text-based adventure where a player can explore a forest, find a magical sword, and enter a cave. Provide a simple command to navigate and interact with objects.
expected_outcome: A working text adventure game where users can navigate rooms and interact with items using text commands. Users should be able to restart the game and save/load their progress.

title: Multi-Perspective News Summary
description: Create a summarization task where the AI must generate a concise summary of a news article from multiple perspectives. The summary should reflect the viewpoints of key stakeholders involved in the story, such as the government, the affected community, and advocacy groups, ensuring a balanced representation.
constraints: The summary must be no more than 150 words and include at least two distinct perspectives. Provide an example news article for context.
example_prompt: Summarize the following article, incorporating at least the perspectives of the local government and environmental activists regarding new construction plans in your city.
expected_outcome: A clear and concise summary that covers the viewpoints of both the local government and environmental activists, within the 150-word limit.

title: Narrative Optimization through Variations
description: Create a set of five varied narrative prompts based on a single story concept. Each prompt should explore a different perspective, genre, or tone while maintaining the core premise. Your goal is to encourage an AI to generate unique outputs that reflect the versatility of storytelling.
constraints: Each prompt must be no more than 50 words and must incorporate at least one character, one conflict, and a unique setting or situation. Provide variations in tone such as comedic, tragic, mysterious, etc.
example_prompt: Consider a small town where everyone knows each other's secrets. Create a prompt to explore this theme in a comedic, tragic, and mysterious way.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate five distinct story starters that align with the different tones specified, showcasing the flexibility of the narrative premise while being imaginative and engaging.

title: Implement a Recursive Function to Generate Permutations with Specific Constraints
description: Your task is to write a recursive function that generates all permutations of a given list of integers while adhering to specific constraints. The function should only yield unique permutations and must handle duplicate integers appropriately. Additionally, provide a mechanism to limit the maximum number of returned permutations based on a specified threshold parameter. Include error handling for invalid inputs and optimize for performance.
constraints: The function must take a list of integers and an integer threshold as parameters. It should return a list containing up to 'threshold' unique permutations. The solution must handle edge cases such as empty lists and lists with duplicate integers. Max 200 lines of code.
example_prompt: Write a function `generate_permutations(numbers: List[int], threshold: int) -> List[List[int]]` that generates unique permutations of `numbers` and limits the output to `threshold` unique results.
expected_outcome: The function should return a list of unique permutations. For example, calling `generate_permutations([1, 1, 2], 3)` should return `[[1, 1, 2], [1, 2, 1], [2, 1, 1]]`. If the input is too large or invalid, appropriate error messages should be raised.

title: Design a Sustainable Water Bottle
description: Your task is to create a concept for a sustainable water bottle aimed at environmentally conscious consumers. Consider materials, functionality, and user experience in your design. Be sure to justify your choices with at least three key benefits of your design.
constraints: Max 150 words; must include material choice and user benefits; sketches are optional.
example_prompt: Design a water bottle using biodegradable materials that can keep drinks cold for up to 12 hours. Explain how your design reduces environmental impact and enhances user experience.
expected_outcome: A detailed description of the water bottle concept, including materials, functionality, and at least three benefits that highlight its sustainability and user experience.

title: Multi-Source Contextual Summarization
description: Create a summarization model that can consolidate information from at least three different source articles on a specific topic, highlighting key insights, common themes, and contrasting opinions. The summary should preserve the essence of each source while providing a coherent narrative that is informative and engaging.
constraints: The summary must be between 200-300 words and should clearly reference the contributions of each source without redundancy. Sources must be recent, from credible outlets, and encompass varied perspectives on the topic.
example_prompt: 'Summarize the implications of climate change policies based on the following three articles: 1. Article A discusses the economic impacts of climate change. 2. Article B explores the social consequences. 3. Article C offers a technological view on renewable energy solutions.'
expected_outcome: A comprehensive, cohesive summary that effectively integrates crucial points from all three articles, demonstrates an understanding of the topic's complexity, and presents a balanced view that reflects the richness of the sources provided.

title: Dynamic Query Generation for Graph Databases
description: Create a function that dynamically generates and executes complex queries for a graph database based on user input. The function should handle various relationships, depth levels, and filtering criteria while ensuring SQL injection protection and efficient data retrieval.
constraints: Code must be in Python, utilize a graph database like Neo4j, and adhere to specified performance benchmarks. Must include error handling and support for nested queries.
example_prompt: Design a function called 'dynamic_graph_query' that takes user-defined parameters for node types, relationship types, depth, and constraints. Provide example input and expected output for querying connected nodes based on user criteria.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-documented Python function that generates a Cypher query for Neo4j, displays the results upon execution, and meets the performance requirements specified, with both success and failure scenarios documented.

title: Simple Email Reminder Automation
description: Create a prompt to automate sending a reminder email for upcoming tasks. The prompt should specify the task name, due date, and recipient email, and it should encourage the generation of a well-structured reminder message.
constraints: Max 100 words, must include an example of how to format the task details.
example_prompt: Create a reminder email for the task 'Submit report' due on 'March 5' to 'example@domain.com'.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a clear reminder email that includes the task name, due date, and a polite message asking the recipient to remember the task.

title: Content Extraction and Sentiment Summary
description: In this challenge, you are tasked with summarizing a given article by extracting the main points and conveying the overall sentiment of the text. Your summary should encapsulate key ideas while indicating whether the sentiment is positive, negative, or neutral based on the content of the article.
constraints: Your summary must be between 150-200 words and include a one-sentence sentiment analysis. Provide at least three key points extracted from the text.
example_prompt: Summarize the following article on climate change, highlighting the main points and the sentiment. 'The recent report from the IPCC emphasizes the critical need for global action against climate change, presenting alarming data on rising temperatures and their impacts on ecosystems. Many countries are recognized for their ambitious goals, but significant challenges remain, underscoring the urgency of collaboration to mitigate risks.'
expected_outcome: A 150-200 word summary of the article that includes three key points about climate change and a one-sentence sentiment indicating the overall tone of the article, such as 'The sentiment of the article is negative due to the urgent warnings and lack of substantial progress.'

title: Sustainable Product Redesign Challenge
description: Develop a comprehensive redesign for an everyday product that significantly reduces its environmental impact without compromising functionality or consumer appeal. Consider materials, manufacturing processes, and lifecycle sustainability in your proposal, and ensure that the design is both aesthetically pleasing and marketable.
constraints: The prompt must be no more than 150 words, include specific sustainability metrics to meet, and suggest at least three viable materials or technologies to be incorporated. Proposals must also demonstrate a clear understanding of the consumer's needs and market trends.
example_prompt: Redesign the traditional plastic water bottle to be more sustainable. Consider using biodegradable materials, innovative manufacturing methods, and ways to encourage consumer reuse. Include metrics to measure the reduction in carbon footprint.
expected_outcome: A detailed product design proposal that includes sketches, materials used, potential manufacturing methods, sustainability metrics, and an analysis of how the redesign meets consumer needs and market trends.

title: Create a Simple Weather API Client
description: In this challenge, you will build a Python client that interacts with a weather API to retrieve current weather data for a given city. The client should handle HTTP requests, process JSON responses, and display weather information (temperature, humidity, and weather conditions) in a user-friendly format.
constraints: The program must include error handling for API requests and invalid city input. Use the requests library and structure the code into functions. Provide at least two examples of valid and invalid city names in your documentation.
example_prompt: Create a weather client that fetches data from the OpenWeatherMap API given a city name and prints the current temperature, humidity, and conditions. Handle cases where the city does not exist or the API fails to respond gracefully.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a Python script that successfully fetches and displays the current weather data, including error handling and function-based structure, along with documentation/examples.

title: Character Trait Analysis Prompt
description: Create a prompt that instructs the AI to analyze a fictional character from a book or movie and evaluate their motivations, key traits, and development throughout the story. The prompt should guide the AI to use specific quotes from the text to support its analysis and include comparisons to other characters for deeper insight.
constraints: The prompt must be between 80-120 words and require at least two supporting quotes from the source material. It should also prompt for a comparison to one other character.
example_prompt: Analyze the character of Elizabeth Bennet from 'Pride and Prejudice'. Discuss her key personality traits, motivations, and how she evolves throughout the story. Use at least two quotes to illustrate your points and compare her to Mr. Darcy in terms of their character development.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a well-structured analysis that includes Elizabeth Bennet's traits, motivations, and character evolution, supported by quotes, and a comparison with Mr. Darcy that highlights their respective development.

title: Dynamic Code Refactoring Challenge
description: Your task is to refactor a large, legacy codebase that processes and analyzes user data from various sources. The existing code is poorly documented, has multiple redundancies and violates several design principles. Your goal is to improve the maintainability and performance of the code while introducing tests for key functionalities, ensuring the output remains unchanged.
constraints: The codebase must be at least 500 lines of code, must include unit tests, and should implement at least one design pattern.
example_prompt: Refactor the provided Python code that processes user data to improve both performance and readability, ensuring functionality remains the same and add unit tests for key components.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a refactored version of the given code, enhancing its structure, improving efficiency, and including a comprehensive suite of unit tests.

title: Advanced Algorithm Optimization Challenge
description: Create a function that efficiently solves the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) for a given list of city coordinates. The function should utilize dynamic programming and memoization techniques to minimize time complexity, aiming for a solution that can handle up to 100 cities within a time limit of 10 seconds. Additionally, provide a detailed explanation of the algorithm used, including its time complexity analysis.
constraints: The solution must be written in Python, include comprehensive unit tests for verification, and incorporate a visualization of the optimal path found. Maximum 150 words for the explanation.
example_prompt: Implement a function `tsp(cities: List[Tuple[float, float]]) -> Tuple[List[int], float]` that returns the optimal order of visiting the cities and the minimum distance traveled.
expected_outcome: A Python function that solves TSP efficiently, along with unit tests validating the correctness of the implementation and a visual representation of the optimal tour path.

title: Multi-Step Logic Puzzle Creation
description: Design a prompt that asks the AI to solve a multi-step logic puzzle based on a given scenario. The puzzle should involve multiple variables and require the AI to deduce the correct outcome by processing the information sequentially. Ensure the scenario is engaging and relevant to real-life problem-solving contexts.
constraints: The prompt must be 150-200 words, include at least three characters, and define specific relationships between them. Provide one complete example of a solved puzzle for reference.
example_prompt: Create a logic puzzle involving three friends: Alice, Bob, and Charlie. Each friend can be from a different city (New York, Los Angeles, Chicago) and has a different favorite sport (basketball, baseball, soccer). Using the clues provided, deduce who is from where and what their favorite sport is. Example Clue: Alice is not from Chicago and doesn't like basketball.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a clear multi-step logic puzzle that includes the setup, a series of clues, and a solution that demonstrates the deduction process clearly and logically.

title: Narrative Universe Creation
description: Design a prompt that instructs an AI to create an entirely new narrative universe that includes detailed world-building elements, character arcs, and a unique conflict. The prompt should encourage the AI to produce a multi-layered story outline that can serve as the foundation for a novel or screenplay.
constraints: The prompt must be exactly 150 words, include at least four distinct characters, and specify one central conflict. Additionally, the universe must have its own set of rules or laws that differ from our reality.
example_prompt: Create a new narrative universe where time travelers from a dystopian future inadvertently change historical events, leading to an alternate present. Develop four unique characters: a cynical historian, an idealistic time agent, a rogue scientist, and a conflicted political leader. Establish the central conflict around a race to retrieve a device that could restore the original timeline while exploring the implications of their actions in this altered history.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a comprehensive outline that includes the universe's rules, character backgrounds, relationships, and key plot points revolving around the central conflict.

title: Dynamic Ad Copy Generation for Multi-Channel Campaigns
description: Design an AI prompt that generates compelling ad copy tailored for various digital marketing channels (social media, email, and PPC). The challenge is to ensure the generated copy adheres to platform-specific guidelines while appealing to distinct target audiences based on demographics and psychographics, highlighting different product features effectively.
constraints: Max 150 words, must include examples of target personas and specific ad types for each channel
example_prompt: Create ad copy for a technology product aimed at young professionals on Instagram, focusing on how it enhances productivity. Provide three variations: one for a promotional post, one for a story ad, and one for an email newsletter.
expected_outcome: A set of three distinctly styled ad copies that are platform-appropriate, resonate with the target audience, and clearly communicate the product's benefits.

title: Scenario-Based Decision Making
description: You are tasked with creating a decision-making scenario that requires the AI to weigh pros and cons in a structured manner. The scenario should involve a character facing a critical choice in a professional context, and the AI must provide a detailed analysis of the potential outcomes based on different decisions.
constraints: The scenario must include at least three possible choices, each with at least two pros and two cons. The entire prompt must not exceed 150 words.
example_prompt: Consider a mid-level manager deciding whether to implement a flexible work-from-home policy. Outline three choices: maintain the current policy, partially implement the new policy, or fully adopt it. Provide pros and cons for each choice.
expected_outcome: The AI should generate a structured analysis that outlines the pros and cons of each decision, helping the character understand the ramifications of their choices.

title: Multi-Scenario Outcome Prediction
description: Design a prompt that leads an AI to analyze multiple scenarios involving a complex decision-making problem. The AI should evaluate the potential outcomes based on varying parameters and provide recommendations tailored to specific stakeholder interests. Include the rationale behind each recommendation for clarity.
constraints: The prompt must require the AI to handle at least three different scenarios and specify at least five parameters affecting the decisions. The maximum length is 150 words.
example_prompt: "Imagine a tech company facing challenges in product launch strategies under varying market conditions, economic climates, and consumer behavior shifts. Given the following parameters (market saturation, R&D costs, competition level, consumer demand, and regulatory landscape), analyze three distinct scenarios and provide a detailed recommendation for each case with reasons for your choices."
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a structured analysis detailing three scenarios, outcomes for each, and well-reasoned, tailored recommendations for each scenario that address the complexities of the parameters provided.

title: Inventive Narrative Construction
description: Create a unique character-driven narrative using a series of three random objects provided by the AI. The challenge is to weave these objects into a compelling storyline that highlights their significance to the character's journey. The narrative should explore themes of transformation or discovery, utilizing vivid descriptions and emotional depth.
constraints: Max 500 words; must include the three provided objects; narrative should follow a clear arc with a beginning, middle, and end.
example_prompt: Write a story about a character who finds a vintage compass, an old photograph, and a broken watch, exploring how these items shape their understanding of their past and future.
expected_outcome: A complete narrative that skillfully incorporates the three objects, revealing character development and thematic depth while maintaining an engaging plot.

title: Complex Scenario Analysis and Solution Derivation
description: Develop a prompt that requires generating a comprehensive analysis of a given complex scenario involving multiple interconnected factors. The scenario should challenge the AI to provide rational reasoning, prioritize actions, and suggest a feasible solution based on available data. You should specify the elements the AI must consider in its reasoning, ensuring a thorough understanding of cause and effect relationships.
constraints: The prompt must be at least 150 words, include at least three distinct factors to analyze, and provide a structured approach for the AI's response.
example_prompt: Given a company facing declining revenue due to increased competition, changing consumer preferences, and operational inefficiencies, analyze these factors and propose a comprehensive strategy for the company to regain market share. Include the rationale for each proposed action and its expected impact on the revenue stream.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed analysis that breaks down the complexities of the scenario, outlines potential solutions, and evaluates the implications of each solution on the company’s future performance.

title: Design a Minimalist Desk Organizer
description: Your task is to create a minimalist desk organizer that efficiently holds everyday office supplies. Consider factors such as functionality, aesthetic appeal, and user-friendliness while designing your product. Aim for a design that takes up minimal space yet maximizes storage capacity.
constraints: Design must be visually represented, use 3 colors maximum, and include at least 3 compartments. Write a brief description (max 100 words) explaining the design features and use.
example_prompt: Create a minimalist desk organizer using no more than 3 colors and 3 compartments. Describe how each compartment is used and their sizes in a brief (100 words) description.
expected_outcome: A visual design of a desk organizer along with a concise description highlighting its key features, materials used, and intended user benefits.

title: Multilevel Summarization of Complex Articles
description: Create a prompt that guides the AI to produce a detailed summary that captures multiple layers of information from a complex academic article. The summary should highlight key arguments, methodologies, and findings while maintaining coherence and accuracy. Additionally, include an abstract-style summary to give an overview along with bullet points focused on critical insights.
constraints: The final summary should be no longer than 300 words, include a 50-word abstract, and provide a sorted list of at least five critical insights extracted from the article.
example_prompt: Summarize the provided academic article titled 'The Impact of Climate Change on Global Agriculture' to include a 50-word abstract and a list of at least five significant insights, ensuring clarity and depth in covering the main arguments and findings.
expected_outcome: A comprehensive summary that includes an abstract, a coherent narrative of the article's content, and a bulleted list of critical insights relevant to the field of study.

title: Dynamic Data Pipeline Generator
description: Create a program that generates data processing pipelines dynamically based on input specifications provided by the user. The pipeline should be able to accommodate different data types, transformation functions, and output formats, ensuring that each component of the pipeline can be easily modified, added, or removed.
constraints: The solution must be implemented in Python and should utilize object-oriented principles. It should support at least three different data transformation functions and allow for user input to configure the pipeline. Include error handling for incorrect input types and formats.
example_prompt: You are tasked with building a data processing pipeline. The user will specify the input dataset, desired transformations (e.g., normalization, filtering), and the output format (JSON, CSV). Create a program that constructs this pipeline based on user input.
expected_outcome: An executable Python program that prompts the user for input specifications and constructs a configurable data processing pipeline based on the given transformations and outputs the results in the specified format.

title: Smart Home Ecosystem Redesign Challenge
description: Design a comprehensive and innovative smart home ecosystem that seamlessly integrates various devices and user interfaces. Your design should prioritize user experience, accessibility, and sustainability while incorporating cutting-edge technology trends such as AI, IoT, and energy efficiency. Consider the interaction between users and devices in different scenarios, and outline the workflow for initial setup and daily use.
constraints: Submit a 2,000-word report including visuals, user personas, and scenario-based user journey maps. Use a formal tone and provide at least three alternative solutions for contrasting features.
example_prompt: Develop a user-centered smart home interface that caters specifically to elderly users, ensuring safety and ease of use while incorporating voice activation and remote monitoring features.
expected_outcome: A detailed report presenting a cohesive smart home design with visuals illustrating device integration and user interactions, accompanied by user persona assessments to validate the design choices.

title: Crafting an Engaging Social Media Caption
description: Create a captivating social media caption for a new product launch that targets young adults. The caption should appeal to their interests and encourage engagement, incorporating a call-to-action and relevant hashtags.
constraints: The caption must be 50-100 words, maintain a friendly and energetic tone, and include at least two hashtags related to the product.
example_prompt: Write a social media caption for the launch of a new reusable water bottle that is environmentally friendly and trendy.
expected_outcome: An engaging social media caption that captures the essence of the product, encourages sharing, and connects with the target audience.

title: Create a Targeted Email Campaign
description: Design a targeted email marketing campaign for a fictional eco-friendly product. This campaign should include three different email templates: one for awareness, one for consideration, and one for conversion. Each template must clearly convey the product's benefits and align with a distinct stage of the customer journey.
constraints: Each email should be between 150-200 words, use a friendly and persuasive tone, and include a call-to-action. Ensure that the messaging is tailored to an eco-conscious audience.
example_prompt: Create an awareness email introducing an eco-friendly laundry detergent, a consideration email highlighting its benefits over traditional options, and a conversion email with a limited-time offer.
expected_outcome: Three well-structured email templates that effectively target potential customers at different stages in their decision-making process, showcasing the unique selling propositions of the eco-friendly product.

title: Dynamic Maze Solver with AI Traversal
description: Develop an algorithm that dynamically generates a random maze and implements a pathfinding AI that can effectively traverse it. The algorithm should be able to adjust the maze's complexity based on a predetermined difficulty level and output the steps taken to solve the maze in clear format, while also handling edge cases where no valid path exists.
constraints: The maze must support various sizes (e.g., 5x5 to 20x20), should have at least one solution, and output must be in JSON format detailing the maze structure and solution path steps. Comments explaining key parts of the code are required.
example_prompt: Create a Python function that generates a random maze of a given size, then implement A* pathfinding to find a path from the start to the finish. Output the results in a structured JSON format.
expected_outcome: A Python script that generates a random maze, implements an AI pathfinding algorithm (like A*), successfully finds a path through the maze, and returns an output in JSON that contains the maze representation and the solution steps.

title: Advanced Ethical Dilemma Reasoning
description: Create a scenario involving a complex ethical dilemma that requires deep moral reasoning. The challenge is to reason through the implications of various decisions, weighing consequences, responsibilities, and ethical principles such as utilitarianism and deontology. Provide a comprehensive analysis that highlights multiple perspectives and possible outcomes of each choice.
constraints: Answer must be between 800-1200 words, analytical tone, thoroughly cited ethical theories.
example_prompt: Imagine a self-driving car must choose between hitting a pedestrian and swerving into a wall, potentially injuring its passengers. Analyze the ethical implications of the car's programmed response based on various ethical frameworks.
expected_outcome: An in-depth essay that presents a nuanced exploration of the ethical dilemmas involved in autonomous vehicle decision-making, illustrating the reasoning process through the lenses of different philosophical theories.

title: Redesigning Everyday Objects for Enhanced User Experience
description: In this challenge, you are tasked with selecting a common household item that is often taken for granted, such as a coffee maker or a trash can, and redesigning it to improve the user experience. Consider aspects like usability, aesthetics, sustainability, and technology integration in your redesign. You must provide sketches, digital prototypes, and a detailed rationale for your design choices.
constraints: You must submit a detailed design brief (1000-1500 words), include at least 3 visual design elements (prototypes or sketches), and a short video pitch (max 2 minutes) describing your design.
example_prompt: Choose a household item and redesign it with a focus on user experience improvement. Explain your design considerations and present visual aids and a pitch.
expected_outcome: A well-structured design brief with sketches/prototypes that articulate the innovative aspects of the redesign, accompanied by a compelling video pitch that effectively communicates the design's benefits and usability enhancements.

title: The Time Capsule Narrative
description: Design a compelling narrative that transcends time and space, where the protagonist discovers a time capsule containing items from various eras. Each item not only reveals a piece of history but also imparts a crucial life lesson that shapes the character's journey. Challenge yourself to weave together multiple timelines and perspectives into a cohesive and engaging story.
constraints: The story must be between 1500 to 2000 words, incorporating at least five distinct historical periods, and must be written in a tone that balances nostalgia with urgency.
example_prompt: Write a narrative about a young individual who unearths a time capsule on their family property, filled with objects from different eras, and recounts a life-changing lesson from each item.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a detailed narrative that includes rich descriptions of the items found, the historical contexts from which they originate, and how each one contributes to the character's growth.

title: Character Creation Challenge
description: In this challenge, you will create a unique character for a short story. Focus on detailing their appearance, background, and a quirky personality trait. This exercise will help you practice providing specific and vibrant details in your prompts.
constraints: Word count should be between 150-200 words. The tone should be playful and imaginative.
example_prompt: Create a character named 'Luna the Dreamweaver', who has vibrant purple hair and an unusual ability to influence dreams. Describe her appearance, a bit of her backstory, and one quirky habit she has.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a vivid character description complete with physical traits, background details, and a unique personality trait, all within the specified word count.

title: Multi-Document Summarization of Research Articles
description: In this challenge, you will summarize the findings and methods from a collection of at least five research articles related to a specific scientific topic. The summary must integrate the main ideas and highlight any contradictions or common themes identified across the documents, providing a holistic view of the current state of research in that area.
constraints: The summary should not exceed 600 words, must be organized thematically, and should avoid jargon. Additionally, each theme should be clearly labeled for easy navigation. The tone should be formal and suitable for an academic audience.
example_prompt: Summarize the key findings and methodologies from the following five articles on climate change impacts on agriculture. Highlight any agreements or disagreements among the authors' conclusions.
expected_outcome: The AI should produce a coherent 600-word summary organized by theme, capturing the essence of each article, while clearly labeling the themes and maintaining an academic tone.

title: Simple Calculator Prompt Engineering
description: In this challenge, you will create prompts that help an AI generate a simple calculator program in Python. The program should be able to perform basic operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. You'll need to ensure the prompts are clear and guide the AI to include input validation for the operations.
constraints: The calculator must handle at least four operations and validate user inputs. Prompts should be under 100 words and encourage step-by-step responses.
